cooking_method: ['- Rinse rice and cook in 4 cups water with a pinch of salt until fluffy (15-20 minutes). Keep warm.', 'Rinse lentils. Heat ghee/oil in a pot, add cumin seeds.', 'Add onion, garlic and ginger; sauté until golden. Add tomatoes and all spices, cook until tomatoes soften.', 'Add lentils and 4 cups water. Bring to boil, then simmer 20-25 minutes until soft and creamy. Adjust salt and consistency.', 'Garnish with cilantro and extra ghee. Serve with rice, tarkari and achar.']
ingredients: ['2 cups basmati rice', '1 cup red lentils (masoor dal)', '1 large onion finely chopped', '2 tomatoes chopped', '4 cloves garlic minced', '1 inch ginger minced', '1 tsp turmeric powder', '1 tsp cumin seeds', '1 tsp coriander powder', '1/2 tsp red chili powder', '2 tbsp ghee or mustard oil', 'Salt to taste', 'Fresh cilantro chopped', 'Water as needed']

cooking_method: ['- Rinse rice 2-3 times until water runs clear.', 'In a pot, add rice, water, salt and ghee. Bring to a boil.', 'Reduce heat to low, cover and cook for 15-18 minutes until water is absorbed.', 'Let it rest covered for 5 minutes, then fluff with a fork.', 'Serve hot as base for dal, tarkari or any curry.']
ingredients: ['2 cups basmati rice', '4 cups water', '1/2 tsp salt', '1 tsp ghee (optional)']

cooking_method: ['- Rinse lentils well.', 'Heat ghee, temper cumin seeds, then sauté onion, garlic and ginger.', 'Add tomatoes, turmeric, chili powder and salt. Cook 3-4 minutes.', 'Add lentils and water. Pressure cook 10 minutes or simmer 25 minutes until soft.', 'Mash slightly for creamy texture. Garnish with cilantro and a spoon of ghee.']
ingredients: ['1 cup red or yellow lentils', '1 onion finely chopped', '2 tomatoes chopped', '3 cloves garlic', '1 inch ginger', '1 tsp turmeric', '1 tsp cumin seeds', '1/2 tsp chili powder', '2 tbsp ghee', 'Salt to taste', 'Fresh cilantro', 'Water (4 cups)']

cooking_method: ['- Heat oil, add cumin seeds. Sauté onion until golden.', 'Add tomatoes and all spices, cook until oil separates.', 'Add all vegetables and salt. Stir-fry 2-3 minutes.', 'Add 1 cup water, cover and cook 15-20 minutes until vegetables are tender.', 'Garnish with cilantro. Serve with dal bhat.']
ingredients: ['2 potatoes cubed', '1 cup cauliflower florets', '1 carrot sliced', '1 cup green beans', '1 onion chopped', '2 tomatoes chopped', '1 tsp cumin seeds', '1 tsp turmeric', '1 tsp coriander powder', '1/2 tsp chili powder', '2 tbsp mustard oil', 'Salt to taste', 'Fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['- Bring water and salt to a rolling boil in a heavy pot.', 'Gradually add buckwheat flour while stirring continuously with a wooden spatula to avoid lumps.', 'Cook on medium heat, stirring vigorously for 8-10 minutes until it forms a smooth, firm dough-like consistency.', 'Add ghee and mix well.', 'Serve hot with dal, tarkari or gundruk.']
ingredients: ['2 cups buckwheat flour (kodo or fapar)', '4-5 cups water', '1/2 tsp salt', '2 tbsp ghee', '1 tsp cumin seeds (optional)']

cooking_method: ['- Prepare dhido as in recipe #5.', 'Soak gundruk in warm water for 10 minutes, squeeze out excess water.', 'Heat oil, sauté onion, garlic, cumin. Add tomatoes, turmeric and gundruk. Cook 5-7 minutes.', 'Add a little water if needed for gravy.', 'Serve dhido with this gundruk tarkari on the side.']
ingredients: ['2 cups buckwheat flour', '4 cups water', '1 cup gundruk (fermented greens)', '1 onion chopped', '2 tomatoes chopped', '3 cloves garlic', '1 tsp turmeric', '1 tsp cumin', '2 tbsp mustard oil', 'Salt to taste']

cooking_method: ['- Prepare plain dhido following recipe #5.', 'Prepare simple dal as in recipe #3.', 'Serve hot dhido with generous dal, extra ghee and any achar.']
ingredients: ['2 cups buckwheat flour for dhido', '1 cup red lentils for dal', '1 onion', '2 tomatoes', '1 tsp turmeric', '1 tsp cumin', '2 tbsp ghee', 'Salt to taste', 'Water']

cooking_method: ['- Bring salted water to vigorous boil.', 'Slowly sprinkle millet flour while stirring constantly with wooden spoon.', 'Cook 8-10 minutes on medium heat, stirring vigorously until thick and glossy.', 'Finish with ghee.', 'Serve with meat curry, dal or gundruk.']
ingredients: ['2 cups finger millet flour (kodo)', '5 cups water', '1/2 tsp salt', '2 tbsp ghee']
recipe_name: Kodo Ko Dhido - Finger Millet Porridge

cooking_method: ['- Boil water with salt.', 'Gradually add cornmeal while stirring continuously to prevent lumps.', 'Cook on medium heat for 10-12 minutes until it reaches firm porridge consistency.', 'Add ghee and mix.', 'Traditionally served with spicy tarkari or pickle.']
ingredients: ['2 cups cornmeal (makai ko pitho)', '4.5 cups water', '1/2 tsp salt', '2 tbsp ghee or butter']

cooking_method: ['- Soak gundruk in warm water 10 minutes, drain.', 'Heat oil, fry dried chilies and cumin. Add onion and garlic, sauté.', 'Add tomatoes, turmeric and gundruk. Cook 5 minutes.', 'Add water and salt. Boil then simmer 15 minutes.', 'Serve hot as soup with rice or dhido.']
ingredients: ['1 cup gundruk', '1 onion chopped', '2 tomatoes chopped', '3 cloves garlic minced', '1 tsp turmeric', '1 tsp cumin seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '2 tbsp mustard oil', 'Salt to taste', '4 cups water']

cooking_method: ['- Soak gundruk, squeeze dry and chop coarsely.', 'In a bowl mix gundruk with onion, chilies, timur, chili powder and salt.', 'Heat mustard oil until smoking, pour over the mixture.', 'Add lemon juice and cilantro, mix well.', 'Serve as side with dal bhat or rice.']
ingredients: ['1.5 cups gundruk soaked and squeezed', '1 small onion finely sliced', '2-3 green chilies chopped', '1 tsp timur (Szechuan pepper)', '1/2 tsp chili powder', '2 tbsp mustard oil', 'Salt to taste', 'Fresh cilantro', '1 tsp lemon juice']
recipe_name: Gundruk Sadeko - Spicy Fermented Greens Salad

cooking_method: ['- Soak sinki in warm water for 15 minutes.', 'Heat oil, temper cumin, sauté onion, garlic, ginger.', 'Add tomatoes, turmeric, sinki and salt. Cook 5 minutes.', 'Add water and simmer 15-20 minutes.', 'Serve hot as soup.']
ingredients: ['1 cup sinki (dried fermented radish)', '1 onion chopped', '2 tomatoes', '4 cloves garlic', '1 inch ginger', '1 tsp turmeric', '2 tbsp mustard oil', '1 tsp cumin', 'Salt to taste', '4-5 cups water']
recipe_name: Sinki Ko Jhol - Fermented Radish Soup

cooking_method: ['- Roast tomatoes on flame or boil until skin peels. Chop.', 'Mix chopped tomatoes with onion, chilies, garlic, timur and salt.', 'Heat mustard oil till smoking, pour over mixture. Add cilantro.', 'Mix well. Let rest 10 minutes.', 'Serve with hot steamed rice.']
ingredients: ['4 large ripe tomatoes', '1 onion finely chopped', '4 green chilies', '3 cloves garlic', '1 tsp timur', '2 tbsp mustard oil', 'Salt to taste', 'Fresh cilantro', '2 cups cooked rice']
recipe_name: Golbheda Ko Achar with Rice - Tomato Pickle with Rice

cooking_method: ['- Heat oil, add cumin. Sauté onion and chilies.', 'Add tomatoes and spices, cook until soft.', 'Add potatoes and salt. Stir 2 minutes.', 'Add 1 cup water, cover and cook 15-20 minutes until potatoes are done.', 'Garnish and serve with dal bhat.']
ingredients: ['5 medium potatoes cubed', '1 large onion chopped', '2 tomatoes chopped', '2 green chilies', '1 tsp cumin seeds', '1 tsp turmeric', '1 tsp coriander powder', '1/2 tsp chili powder', '2 tbsp mustard oil', 'Salt to taste', 'Cilantro']

cooking_method: ['- Boil soaked bodi until soft.', 'Heat oil, sauté onion, add tomatoes and spices.', 'Add potatoes, bodi, tama and salt. Stir-fry.', 'Add water and simmer 20-25 minutes until gravy thickens.', 'Serve with rice.']
ingredients: ['3 potatoes cubed', '1/2 cup dried bodi (black eyed peas) soaked overnight', '1 cup tama (bamboo shoot) sliced', '1 onion', '2 tomatoes', '1 tsp turmeric', '1 tsp cumin', '2 tbsp mustard oil', 'Salt to taste', 'Green chilies']
recipe_name: Alu Bodi Tama - Potato, Black Eyed Peas & Bamboo Shoot Curry

cooking_method: ['- Cook soaked peas until tender.', 'Heat oil, sauté onion, add tomatoes and spices.', 'Add cooked peas and some water. Simmer 10-15 minutes.', 'Finish with garam masala and cilantro.']
ingredients: ['1 cup black eyed peas (soaked)', '1 onion chopped', '2 tomatoes', '1 tsp turmeric', '1 tsp cumin', '1 tsp garam masala', '2 tbsp mustard oil', 'Salt', 'Cilantro']

cooking_method: ['- Sauté onion in oil. Add tomatoes and spices.', 'Add peas and salt. Cook 8-10 minutes with little water.', 'Serve with roti or rice.']
ingredients: ['2 cups fresh or frozen green peas', '1 onion', '2 tomatoes', '1 tsp cumin', '1 tsp turmeric', '1/2 tsp chili powder', '2 tbsp oil', 'Salt']
recipe_name: Kerau Ko Tarkari - Green Pea Curry

cooking_method: ['- Sauté onion, add tomatoes and spices.', 'Add boiled chickpeas and water. Simmer 10-15 minutes.', 'Garnish and serve.']
ingredients: ['1.5 cups chickpeas (soaked & boiled)', '1 onion', '2 tomatoes', '1 tsp turmeric', '1 tsp coriander', '1 tsp cumin', '2 tbsp oil', 'Salt', 'Cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Follow similar method as recipe #3 with red lentils (cooks faster).']
ingredients: ['1 cup red lentils', '1 onion', '2 tomatoes', '3 garlic cloves', '1 inch ginger', '1 tsp turmeric', '1 tsp cumin', '2 tbsp ghee', 'Salt']

cooking_method: ['- Soak dal 30 minutes. Cook until soft.', 'Temper cumin in ghee, sauté onion, tomatoes and spices.', 'Mix with cooked dal and simmer. Garnish with cilantro.']
ingredients: ['1 cup chana dal (split chickpeas)', '1 onion', '2 tomatoes', '1 tsp turmeric', '1 tsp cumin', '2 tbsp ghee', 'Salt', 'Fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Rinse the mung beans until the water runs clear. In a pressure cooker or heavy pot, combine beans, water, turmeric, and salt; simmer until the lentils are completely soft. In a small skillet, heat ghee/oil and sauté cumin seeds, dried chilli, garlic, and ginger until fragrant and golden. Pour this tempering (tadka) over the cooked lentils, garnish with cilantro, and serve hot.']
ingredients: ['1 cup split mung beans', '4 cups water', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 tablespoon ghee or mustard oil', '1/2 teaspoon cumin seeds', '2 cloves garlic (minced)', '1/2 inch ginger (grated)', '1/2 teaspoon kosher salt', '1 tablespoon chopped fresh cilantro', '1 dried red chilli']

cooking_method: ['Boil the urad dal with water, turmeric, and ginger paste until the lentils are tender and creamy. In a separate small pan, heat mustard oil or ghee until smoking. Add the jimbu (or cumin) and asafoetida. Once the herbs sizzle and turn dark, immediately pour the oil into the dal. Stir well and let it sit covered for 2 minutes before serving.']
ingredients: ['1 cup split black urad dal', '4 cups water', '1 teaspoon ginger paste', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '1/2 teaspoon jimbu (dried Himalayan herb) or cumin seeds', '1/4 teaspoon asafoetida', '1/2 teaspoon kosher salt', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 tablespoon ghee']

cooking_method: ['Combine all washed lentils in a pot with water, salt, and turmeric; cook until mushy. In a pan, sauté onions, garlic, and green chilli in ghee until browned. Add tomatoes and cumin-coriander powder, cooking until the tomatoes soften. Mix the savory base into the boiled lentils and simmer for 5 minutes.']
ingredients: ['1/4 cup each of mung, urad, masoor, chana, and toor dal', '5 cups water', '1 medium onion (finely chopped)', '2 medium tomatoes (halved)', '1 teaspoon turmeric', '1 teaspoon cumin-coriander powder', '2 tablespoons ghee', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 cloves garlic', '1 green chilli']

cooking_method: ['Heat mustard oil in a "karai" (wok) until it reaches the smoking point to remove its rawness. Sauté fenugreek seeds until dark brown. Add vegetables and turmeric, stirring to coat. Sprinkle salt and cumin powder, add a splash of water, cover, and cook on low heat until the vegetables are tender.']
ingredients: ['4 cups assorted chopped seasonal vegetables', '3 tablespoons pure mustard oil', '1/2 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/4 cup water']
recipe_name: Tarkari with Mustard Oil (Basic Vegetable Sauté)

cooking_method: ['Thoroughly wash the greens and chop them coarsely. Heat mustard oil and fry the dried chillies and garlic until they are nearly burnt (for aroma). Add the greens and salt. Sauté on high heat without covering until the greens wilt and the moisture evaporates.']
ingredients: ['1 large bunch fresh leafy greens', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '2 dried red chillies', '2 cloves garlic (sliced)', '1/4 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Heat the oil in a pan until hot. Add fenugreek seeds and wait until they turn black. Add garlic and then the mustard greens. Sauté over medium-high heat. The mustard greens will release water; continue cooking until the water is gone and the leaves are tender and slightly crispy.']
ingredients: ['1 lb fresh mustard greens (chopped)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1/2 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '3 cloves garlic (crushed)', '1/2 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Heat ghee in a pan. Sauté cumin seeds until they pop. Add the spinach and salt. Cook quickly for 2–3 minutes until the spinach is just wilted. Sprinkle with a pinch of nutmeg for a traditional touch and serve immediately.']
ingredients: ['2 cups chopped fresh baby spinach (1 1/2 ounces)', '1 tablespoon ghee', '1/2 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1/4 teaspoon salt', '1 pinch nutmeg']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil and sauté garlic and turmeric. Add the fresh methi leaves. Because methi can be bitter, sauté them on medium heat with salt until they are well-cooked and reduced. This is best served with hot rice or corn bread.']
ingredients: ['2 cups fresh fenugreek leaves (cleaned)', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '2 cloves garlic', '1/4 teaspoon turmeric', '1/2 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil and sauté the ginger-garlic paste. Add the hard vegetables (like potatoes) first, followed by the softer ones. Stir in the spices and salt. Add the tomato and a small amount of water. Cover and simmer until all vegetables are soft and the spices have formed a light coating.']
ingredients: ['3 cups mixed local vegetables (potato, beans, cauliflower)', '2 tablespoons oil', '1 teaspoon ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon cumin-coriander powder', '1/2 teaspoon red chilli powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1 tomato (chopped)']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil and fry fenugreek seeds. Add pumpkin cubes and turmeric, sautéing for 5 minutes. Add salt, sugar, and water. Cover and cook on low heat until the pumpkin is tender and starts to break down into a thick, sweet, and savory sauce.']
ingredients: ['4 cups cubed pumpkin', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1/2 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', '1 teaspoon sugar or jaggery', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/2 cup water']

cooking_method: ['Heat ghee and sauté cumin seeds. Add the bottle gourd and turmeric. Bottle gourd has high water content, so cook it in its own juices with a lid on. Once soft, add salt and a splash of milk if a creamier texture is desired.']
ingredients: ['1 medium bottle gourd (peeled and cubed)', '1 tablespoon ghee', '1/2 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/4 cup milk (optional for creaminess)']

cooking_method: ['Fry the parwar and potatoes in oil until they begin to brown. Add turmeric, salt, and cumin powder. Add a few drops of water, cover, and steam until the vegetables are tender. This is a dry curry style.']
ingredients: ['250g pointed gourd (sliced)', '2 medium potatoes (cubed)', '2 tablespoons oil', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil and fry fenugreek seeds until dark. Sauté the ginger-garlic paste, then add eggplant and turmeric. Eggplant absorbs a lot of oil; stir frequently. Cook until the eggplant is very soft and mashed.']
ingredients: ['2 large eggplants (cubed)', '3 tablespoons oil', '1/2 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon turmeric', '1/2 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Sauté potatoes in oil until half-cooked. Add cabbage and peas. Season with salt and turmeric. Cabbage cooks quickly, so sauté on medium-high heat to keep a slight crunch or cover for a softer texture.']
ingredients: ['1 small cabbage (shredded)', '1 potato (thinly sliced)', '1/2 cup green peas', '2 tablespoons oil', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', '1/2 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil and add cumin seeds. Sauté carrots and peas with turmeric and salt. Carrots are naturally sweet, so this dish is often kept simple to highlight the flavor. Cook until tender-crisp.']
ingredients: ['3 large carrots (sliced)', '1 tablespoon oil', '1/2 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1/4 teaspoon turmeric', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1 tablespoon fresh peas']

cooking_method: ['Sauté the radish in mustard oil with fenugreek and spices. Radish has a strong aroma; cooking it thoroughly with spices mellows the flavor. Serve as a side dish with Dal Bhat.']
ingredients: ['2 white radishes (sliced)', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '1/2 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', '1/2 teaspoon red chilli powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Sauté cauliflower and potatoes in oil until lightly browned. Add turmeric, salt, and cumin powder. Add water, cover, and simmer until the cauliflower is soft but still holds its shape.']
ingredients: ['1 medium head cauliflower (florets)', '2 potatoes (cubed)', '2 tablespoons oil', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/2 cup water']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil and sauté the beans and potatoes. Add spices and salt. Cook covered on low heat. The beans will slowly caramelize with the potatoes for a hearty side dish.']
ingredients: ['2 cups green beans (trimmed and snapped)', '1 potato (cubed)', '2 tablespoons oil', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1 teaspoon coriander powder']

cooking_method: ['Peel the fibrous outer layer from the pumpkin stems. Chop the leaves and stems. Sauté garlic in oil, add the greens, salt, and turmeric. Cook until the stems are tender. This is a prized seasonal green in Nepal.']
ingredients: ['1 bunch tender pumpkin leaves and shoots', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '3 cloves garlic', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/4 teaspoon turmeric']

cooking_method: ['To reduce bitterness, rub slices with salt and let sit for 10 minutes, then squeeze out the juice. Fry the slices in hot oil until they are crispy and dark brown. Add turmeric and amchur at the end for a tangy finish.']
ingredients: ['3 bitter gourds (thinly sliced)', '3 tablespoons mustard oil', '1/2 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon amchur (dried mango powder)']

cooking_method: ['Heat mustard oil in a pan until smoking. Add cumin seeds and let them splutter. Add onions, garlic, and ginger paste; sauté until golden. Add turmeric, chili powder, and tomatoes; cook until oil separates. Add chayote cubes and salt; stir well. Add 1 cup water, cover, and simmer until chayote is tender. Garnish with cilantro. Serve with rice or roti.']
ingredients: ['3 medium chayote squash (peeled and cubed)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1 medium onion (finely chopped)', '2 cloves garlic (minced)', '1 teaspoon ginger paste', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '2 medium tomatoes (chopped)', '1 teaspoon salt (or to taste)', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, add fenugreek and cumin seeds. When they darken, add onion and green chilies; sauté until soft. Add turmeric, chili powder, salt, and pumpkin; stir for 2 minutes. Add water, cover, and cook until pumpkin is soft. Mash slightly for thicker curry. Garnish with cilantro.']
ingredients: ['2 cups pumpkin (peeled and cubed)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1 onion (sliced)', '2 green chilies (slit)', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 cup water', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, add okra pieces and fry on medium heat until slime disappears (about 5–7 minutes). Remove okra. In same oil, add cumin seeds, then onion and ginger-garlic paste; sauté until golden. Add turmeric, coriander, chili powder, salt, and tomato; cook until tomato softens. Return okra, add amchur, mix gently. Cook 2 more minutes. Serve with chapati or rice.']
ingredients: ['500g okra (washed, dried, and sliced into 1-inch pieces)', '3 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1 onion (finely chopped)', '1 teaspoon ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon coriander powder', '1/2 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 tomato (chopped)', '1 teaspoon dried mango powder (amchur)']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, add dried red chili and garlic slices; fry until garlic is golden. Add water spinach, turmeric, salt, and sugar. Stir-fry on high heat for 3–4 minutes until leaves wilt but stems are still crunchy. Serve immediately as a side dish.']
ingredients: ['2 bunches water spinach (kangkong, chopped into 2-inch pieces)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '3 cloves garlic (sliced)', '1 dried red chili', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/4 teaspoon sugar']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, add fenugreek seeds and dried chilies until seeds darken. Add turmeric, ginger paste, and bamboo shoots; sauté for 5 minutes. Add water and salt, bring to boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes until shoots are tender and sourness mellows. Garnish with cilantro. Serve with rice.']
ingredients: ['2 cups fermented bamboo shoots (tama, rinsed and drained)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon ginger paste', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 cups water', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']
prep_time: 20 minutes (plus soaking time if using dried shoots)

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, add fenugreek and dried chilies. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, then bamboo shoots; sauté 3 minutes. Add soaked bodi, potatoes, salt, and water. Bring to boil, then simmer for 30–40 minutes until bodi are soft and curry thickens. Garnish with cilantro. Serve with rice.']
ingredients: ['2 medium potatoes (cubed)', '1 cup fermented bamboo shoots (tama)', '1/2 cup dried black-eyed peas (bodi, soaked overnight)', '3 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon salt', '4 cups water', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, add cumin seeds, then onion; sauté until brown. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder; cook 1 minute. Add tomato puree; cook until oil separates. Add mushrooms and salt; cook 5–7 minutes until mushrooms release water and then dry slightly. Sprinkle garam masala. Add cream if desired. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['400g button mushrooms (quartered)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1 onion (chopped)', '2 tomatoes (pureed)', '1 teaspoon ginger paste', '1 teaspoon garlic paste', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon garam masala', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons fresh cream (optional)']

cooking_method: ['Heat 2 tbsp oil, shallow fry tofu cubes until golden; set aside. Add remaining oil, cumin seeds, onion, green chilies; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, coriander, chili powder; cook 1 minute. Add tomato puree and salt; cook until oil separates. Add fried tofu and 1/2 cup water; simmer 5 minutes. Add garam masala and cilantro.']
ingredients: ['400g firm tofu (cubed)', '3 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1 onion (finely chopped)', '2 green chilies (slit)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon coriander powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '2 tomatoes (pureed)', '1 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon garam masala', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, add cumin seeds and onion; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, coriander; cook 1 minute. Add tomato puree and salt; cook until oil separates. Add paneer cubes and 1/2 cup water; simmer 5 minutes. Add garam masala and cream; stir gently. Garnish with cilantro.']
ingredients: ['400g paneer (cubed)', '3 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1 onion (finely chopped)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon coriander powder', '2 tomatoes (pureed)', '1 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon garam masala', '2 tablespoons fresh cream', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, add bay leaves, cloves, cardamom, cinnamon. Add onions; sauté until dark brown. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, coriander; cook 2 minutes. Add tomato puree; cook until oil separates. Add meat and salt; fry until meat browns. Add water, bring to boil, then simmer covered until meat tender (20–30 mins for chicken, 45–60 mins for goat/buffalo). Add garam masala and cilantro.']
ingredients: ['500g meat (goat/chicken/buffalo, cubed)', '4 tablespoons mustard oil', '2 bay leaves', '4 cloves', '4 cardamom pods', '1 cinnamon stick', '2 onions (finely chopped)', '2 tablespoons ginger-garlic paste', '2 teaspoons turmeric powder', '2 teaspoons red chili powder', '2 teaspoons coriander powder', '3 tomatoes (pureed)', '1 tablespoon salt', '2 cups water', '1 teaspoon garam masala', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']
recipe_name: Masu Ko Tarkari (Meat Curry – Base Recipe)

cooking_method: ['Follow same as dish #50 (Masu Ko Tarkari). Cook goat meat for 45–60 minutes until tender.']
ingredients: ['500g goat meat (with bone, cubed)', '4 tablespoons mustard oil', '2 bay leaves', '4 cloves', '4 green cardamoms', '1 black cardamom', '1 cinnamon stick', '2 onions (sliced)', '2 tablespoons ginger-garlic paste', '2 teaspoons turmeric', '2 teaspoons red chili powder', '2 teaspoons coriander powder', '3 tomatoes (chopped)', '1 tablespoon salt', '2 cups water', '1 teaspoon garam masala', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, add cumin seeds and onions; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, coriander; cook 2 minutes. Add tomato puree; cook until oil separates. Add chicken and salt; fry 5–7 minutes. Add water, cover and cook until chicken is tender (15–20 minutes). Add garam masala and cilantro.']
ingredients: ['600g chicken (with bone, curry cut)', '3 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '2 onions (finely chopped)', '2 tablespoons ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon turmeric', '2 teaspoons red chili powder', '2 teaspoons coriander powder', '2 tomatoes (pureed)', '1 tablespoon salt', '1 cup water', '1 teaspoon garam masala', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, add fenugreek seeds; when dark, add onions; sauté until brown. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, coriander; cook 2 minutes. Add tomatoes; cook until soft. Add pork and salt; brown meat. Add water, cover, simmer 40–50 minutes until pork is tender. Add garam masala and cilantro.']
ingredients: ['500g pork shoulder (cubed)', '3 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '2 onions (chopped)', '2 tablespoons ginger-garlic paste', '2 teaspoons turmeric', '2 teaspoons red chili powder', '2 teaspoons coriander powder', '2 tomatoes (chopped)', '1 tablespoon salt', '2 cups water', '1 teaspoon garam masala', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Follow same as #50 but add 3 cups water and cook buffalo meat for 1–1.5 hours until very tender. Buffalo takes longer than goat.']
ingredients: ['500g buffalo meat (cubed)', '4 tablespoons mustard oil', '2 bay leaves', '4 cloves', '4 green cardamoms', '1 black cardamom', '1 cinnamon stick', '2 onions (finely chopped)', '2 tablespoons ginger-garlic paste', '2 teaspoons turmeric', '2 teaspoons red chili powder', '2 teaspoons coriander powder', '3 tomatoes (pureed)', '1 tablespoon salt', '3 cups water', '1 teaspoon garam masala', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, add fenugreek seeds, then onion and green chilies; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, coriander; cook 1 minute. Add tomato puree and salt; cook until oil separates. Add fish pieces gently, then water. Simmer covered for 8–10 minutes (do not stir too much). Add garam masala and cilantro. Serve with rice.']
ingredients: ['600g firm white fish (rohu, catfish, or trout, cut into steaks)', '3 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '1 onion (chopped)', '2 green chilies (slit)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon turmeric', '2 teaspoons red chili powder', '1 teaspoon coriander powder', '2 tomatoes (pureed)', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 cup water', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro', '1 teaspoon garam masala']

cooking_method: ['Soak dried fish in warm water for 10 minutes, then drain. Heat oil, add fenugreek seeds and onion; sauté until brown. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder; cook 1 minute. Add tomatoes; cook until soft. Add fish, salt, and water. Simmer 10–15 minutes until curry thickens. Garnish with cilantro.']
ingredients: ['250g dried/smoked chhyapi fish', '3 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '1 onion (chopped)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon turmeric', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon salt (reduced if fish is salty)', '2 tomatoes (chopped)', '2 cups water', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Rinse dried fish quickly. Heat oil, add cumin seeds and dried chilies. Add onion; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder; cook 1 minute. Add tomatoes; cook until soft. Add dried fish, salt, and water. Simmer 8–10 minutes. Garnish with cilantro.']
ingredients: ['200g small dried fish', '3 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '1 onion (chopped)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon turmeric', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '2 tomatoes (chopped)', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1 cup water', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, add cumin seeds and onion; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, coriander; cook 1 minute. Add tomato puree and salt; cook until oil separates. Add water. Gently add whole boiled eggs. Simmer 5 minutes, spooning gravy over eggs. Add garam masala and cilantro.']
ingredients: ['6 hard-boiled eggs (peeled)', '3 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1 onion (finely chopped)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon turmeric', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon coriander powder', '2 tomatoes (pureed)', '1 teaspoon salt', '1/2 cup water', '1/2 teaspoon garam masala', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, add cumin seeds, onion, green chilies; sauté until golden. Add turmeric, chili powder; cook 30 seconds. Add tomatoes; cook until mushy. Pour beaten eggs and scramble on high heat for 2–3 minutes until eggs are set but soft. Garnish with cilantro. Serve with rice or roti.']
ingredients: ['6 eggs (lightly beaten with pinch of salt)', '3 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1 onion (chopped)', '2 green chilies (chopped)', '1 teaspoon turmeric', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '2 tomatoes (chopped)', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil/ghee in a pan. Add onion and green chilies; sauté until onion is translucent. Add turmeric, chili powder, salt; stir. Crack eggs directly into pan; scramble continuously on medium heat until eggs are cooked to desired consistency (2–3 minutes). Stir in cilantro at the end. Serve hot with chiura (beaten rice) or roti.']
ingredients: ['4 large eggs', '2 tablespoons mustard oil or ghee', '1 small onion (finely chopped)', '2 green chilies (finely chopped)', '1/4 teaspoon turmeric', '1/4 teaspoon red chili powder', '1/4 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)']

cooking_method: ['Heat mustard oil in a pan, add cumin seeds and chili until they splutter, then toss in beaten rice, stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until crisp, and season with salt.']
ingredients: ['2 cups beaten rice (chiura, flattened)', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', 'salt to taste', '1 green chili (chopped, optional)']

cooking_method: ['Soak beaten rice in water for 5 minutes, drain well, mix with yogurt, salt, cumin powder, and cilantro, then chill briefly before serving.']
ingredients: ['2 cups beaten rice (chiura)', '2 cups plain yogurt (dahi)', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon roasted cumin powder', '2 tablespoons chopped cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Warm dal with ghee and turmeric, soak chiura briefly, drain, then layer chiura with hot dal and onions for serving.']
ingredients: ['2 cups beaten rice (chiura)', '1 cup cooked lentil dal', '1 tablespoon ghee', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', 'salt to taste', 'chopped onions optional']

cooking_method: ['Prepare or heat meat curry with ginger, soak and drain chiura, then mix together and drizzle with mustard oil.']
ingredients: ['2 cups beaten rice (chiura)', '1 cup cooked meat curry (masu)', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '1 teaspoon ginger paste', 'salt to taste']

cooking_method: ['Knead flour, water, and salt into dough, rest 10 minutes, roll into flatbreads, cook on hot tawa with ghee until puffed and golden.']
ingredients: ['2 cups whole wheat flour (atta)', '1 cup water', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1 tablespoon ghee']

cooking_method: ['Mix flour and salt, add water to form soft dough, divide into balls, roll thin, cook on dry hot griddle flipping until bubbles form.']
ingredients: ['2 cups whole wheat flour', '3/4 cup water', '1/2 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Knead dough with ghee, rest, roll small circles, deep-fry in hot oil until golden and puffed.']
ingredients: ['2 cups whole wheat flour', '1 tablespoon ghee', '1/2 cup water', 'oil for frying', 'salt pinch']

cooking_method: ['Make layered dough with ghee folds, roll out, cook on tawa with ghee, pressing to puff layers.']
ingredients: ['2 cups whole wheat flour', '1 cup water', '2 tablespoons ghee', 'salt to taste']

cooking_method: ['Knead corn flour with water and salt into soft dough, roll thick rounds, roast on fire or tawa until charred spots appear.']
ingredients: ['2 cups corn flour (makai ko atta)', '1 cup warm water', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1 tablespoon ghee']

cooking_method: ['Mix flour and salt with water to dough, pat into flatbreads, cook on hot griddle until crisp.']
ingredients: ['2 cups millet flour (kodo ko atta)', '1 cup water', '1/2 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Form dough, roll or pat thin, dry-roast on tawa flipping frequently until done.']
ingredients: ['2 cups buckwheat flour (fapar ko atta)', '1 cup water', '1/2 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Knead with ghee, rest dough, roll, cook on tawa with ghee until browned.']
ingredients: ['2 cups barley flour (jau ko atta)', '1 cup water', '1 tablespoon ghee', 'salt to taste']

cooking_method: ['Rinse rice and dal, cook with water, cumin, ghee, and salt until soft porridge forms.']
ingredients: ['1 cup rice', '1/2 cup moong dal', '4 cups water', '1 teaspoon cumin', '1 tablespoon ghee', 'salt to taste']

cooking_method: ['Fry onions and cumin in ghee, add soaked rice and veggies, cook with water until fluffy.']
ingredients: ['2 cups basmati rice', '1 cup mixed vegetables', '1 onion (sliced)', '1 teaspoon cumin', '2 tablespoons ghee', 'salt to taste']

cooking_method: ['Boil and dice potatoes, grind sesame and timur with chili, mix with oil and salt, toss with potatoes, serve with soaked chiura.']
ingredients: ['4 boiled potatoes (diced)', '2 cups beaten rice', '2 tablespoons sesame seeds (toasted)', '1 teaspoon timur (Sichuan pepper)', '2 green chilies', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', 'salt to taste']
recipe_name: Alu Ko Achar with Chiura (Potato Pickle)

cooking_method: ['Simmer rice in milk until thick, add sugar and cardamom, garnish with nuts.']
ingredients: ['1/2 cup rice', '4 cups milk', '1/2 cup sugar', '1 teaspoon cardamom powder', 'nuts handful']

cooking_method: ['Soak chiura, mix with sweetened yogurt and cardamom.']
ingredients: ['2 cups beaten rice', '2 cups yogurt', '1/4 cup sugar', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom']
recipe_name: Beaten Rice with Yogurt and Sugar

cooking_method: ['Mix soaked chiura with chopped veggies, spices, and oil.']
ingredients: ['2 cups beaten rice', '1 onion (chopped)', '2 tomatoes (chopped)', '2 green chilies', '1 teaspoon roasted cumin', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', 'salt to taste']

cooking_method: ['Cook rice in water until mushy porridge, season with salt and ghee.']
ingredients: ['1/2 cup rice', '4 cups water', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1 tablespoon ghee']

cooking_method: ['Pressure cook or simmer rice, lentils, ginger, ghee, and salt to soft consistency.', '# Nepali Dishes Recipes (81–100)']
ingredients: ['1 cup rice', '1/2 cup lentils', '4 cups water', '1 teaspoon ginger', '1 tablespoon ghee', 'salt to taste']

cooking_method: ['Wash the rice thoroughly and place it in a deep pot with water. Add salt, turmeric, and grated ginger. Cook on medium heat while stirring occasionally until the rice breaks down and becomes semisolid and creamy. Add ghee and simmer for 5 more minutes before serving warm.']
ingredients: ['1 cup short grain rice', '5 cups water', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1 tablespoon ghee', '1/4 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon grated ginger']

cooking_method: ['Roast the corn directly over flame or on a grill until lightly charred on all sides. Brush with butter and season with salt, chilli powder, and lemon juice. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['2 whole fresh corn cobs', '1 tablespoon butter', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon chilli powder', '1 tablespoon lemon juice']

cooking_method: ['Bring water to a boil in a large pot. Add salt and corn pieces. Cook for 15–20 minutes until tender. Drain, apply butter if desired, and serve warm.']
ingredients: ['3 corn cobs cut into halves', '6 cups water', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 tablespoon butter']

cooking_method: ['Boil bitter gourd slices briefly and drain. Mix with onions, green chillies, sesame seeds, turmeric, salt, mustard oil, and lemon juice. Toss well and let rest for 10 minutes before serving.']
ingredients: ['2 bitter gourds thinly sliced', '1 small onion sliced', '2 green chillies chopped', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon sesame seeds', '1 tablespoon lemon juice', '1/2 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Heat mustard oil and fry cumin seeds. Add onion and sauté until golden. Stir in tomatoes and spices. Add potatoes and taro stems with water. Cover and cook until vegetables are tender and curry thickens.']
ingredients: ['500 grams taro stems chopped', '2 potatoes cubed', '1 onion chopped', '2 tomatoes chopped', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon coriander powder', '1 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil in a pan and sauté onion and garlic. Add tomatoes and spices. Stir in taro roots and cook for 5 minutes. Add water, cover, and simmer until soft and flavorful.']
ingredients: ['500 grams taro roots peeled and cubed', '1 onion chopped', '2 cloves garlic minced', '1 tomato chopped', '2 tablespoons oil', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil and crackle cumin seeds. Add onions and sauté until soft. Add tomatoes and spices. Stir in yam cubes and cook with water until tender and the gravy thickens.']
ingredients: ['500 grams yam peeled and cubed', '1 onion chopped', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 tomato chopped', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon chilli powder', '1 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Cook onions in oil until golden. Add spices and stir well. Add yam and potato cubes with enough water. Simmer covered until vegetables become soft and flavorful.']
ingredients: ['400 grams elephant foot yam cubed', '1 potato cubed', '1 onion chopped', '2 tablespoons oil', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1 teaspoon coriander powder', '1 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Wash the millet thoroughly. Add millet, water, and salt to a pot and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and cook covered until water is absorbed. Fluff with ghee before serving.']
ingredients: ['2 cups foxtail millet', '4 cups water', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 tablespoon ghee']

cooking_method: ['Rinse the millet and place it in a cooking pot with water and salt. Cook covered on low heat until soft and fluffy. Stir in butter before serving.']
ingredients: ['2 cups barnyard millet', '4 cups water', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 tablespoon butter']

cooking_method: ['Wash buckwheat well and boil with water and salt. Cover and simmer until grains are tender. Add ghee and fluff before serving.']
ingredients: ['2 cups buckwheat groats', '4 cups water', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 tablespoon ghee']

cooking_method: ['Wash the brown rice thoroughly. Cook with water and salt over medium heat for 35–40 minutes until soft. Drain excess water if needed and serve hot.']
ingredients: ['2 cups brown rice', '5 cups water', '1 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Heat mustard oil and sauté garlic and green chilli. Add mustard greens and cook until wilted. Serve hot with beaten rice.']
ingredients: ['2 cups mustard greens chopped', '2 cups beaten rice (chiura)', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '2 cloves garlic minced', '1 green chilli chopped', '1/2 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Soak gundruk in warm water and squeeze dry. Mix with onion, tomato, chillies, mustard oil, timur powder, and salt. Serve alongside steamed rice.']
ingredients: ['1 cup dried gundruk', '1 onion chopped', '2 tomatoes chopped', '2 green chillies chopped', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '1 teaspoon timur powder', '1 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil and sauté onions until soft. Add spices and potatoes. Stir in fern shoots and a little water. Cook covered until vegetables are tender.']
ingredients: ['300 grams fern shoots cleaned', '1 potato cubed', '1 onion chopped', '2 tablespoons oil', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Boil water in a pot and add titepati leaves. Stir in garlic paste, turmeric, and salt. Simmer for 10–15 minutes until flavors combine. Serve warm as a light herbal broth.']
ingredients: ['1 cup titepati leaves cleaned', '4 cups water', '1 teaspoon garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Mix sliced bayar fruit with chillies, mustard oil, chilli powder, salt, and lemon juice. Let it marinate for 10 minutes and serve with dal bhat.']
ingredients: ['1 cup bayar fruit sliced', '2 green chillies chopped', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '1 teaspoon chilli powder', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 tablespoon lemon juice']
recipe_name: Bayar Ko Achaar with Dal Bhat

cooking_method: ['Cook rice in water until half done. Stir in tapsi mixture and salt. Continue cooking on low heat until rice absorbs all moisture. Add ghee before serving.']
ingredients: ['2 cups rice', '1 cup fermented tapsi mixture', '4 cups water', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 tablespoon ghee']

cooking_method: ['Prepare steamed rice and cooked dal separately. Heat ghee in a small pan and fry cumin seeds until aromatic. Pour over dal and serve hot with rice.']
ingredients: ['2 cups steamed rice', '1 cup cooked lentil dal', '2 tablespoons ghee', '1/2 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Wash rice and lentils thoroughly. Cook together with water, turmeric, and salt until soft and porridge-like. Temper cumin seeds in ghee and pour over the khichadi. Serve hot with achar.']
ingredients: ['1 cup rice', '1/2 cup split moong dal', '5 cups water', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 tablespoon ghee', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1 teaspoon salt', '1/2 cup mixed achar']

cooking_method: ['- Boil eggs in water for 8-10 minutes until hard-boiled. Cool, peel and cut in half.', 'Heat ghee in a pan, lightly fry the egg halves with a pinch of salt and pepper.', 'Serve hot boiled eggs over warm rice. Sprinkle with green chili and cilantro.', 'Drizzle extra ghee if desired. Simple and comforting Nepali meal.']
ingredients: ['2 cups cooked basmati rice', '4 large eggs', '1 tbsp ghee', '1/2 tsp salt', '1/4 tsp black pepper', '1 green chili finely chopped (optional)', 'Fresh cilantro for garnish']

cooking_method: ['- Cook rice normally and keep warm.', 'Soak dried fish in warm water for 10 minutes, drain and cut into pieces.', 'Heat mustard oil, fry dried chilies and cumin. Add onion and garlic, sauté.', 'Add tomatoes, turmeric, salt and dried fish. Cook 8-10 minutes.', 'Serve spicy dried fish curry with hot rice.']
ingredients: ['2 cups basmati rice', '150g dried fish (sukeko machha)', '1 onion sliced', '2 tomatoes chopped', '3 cloves garlic minced', '1 tsp turmeric', '1 tsp cumin seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '2 tbsp mustard oil', 'Salt to taste', 'Cilantro']

cooking_method: ['- Soak chiura in water for 2 minutes, drain and set aside.', 'Heat oil, add cumin, sauté onion. Add tomatoes and spices.', 'Add potatoes and peas, cook with little water until tender.', 'Mix drained chiura gently with the hot tarkari.', 'Serve immediately as a quick meal.']
ingredients: ['2 cups chiura (beaten rice)', '3 medium potatoes cubed', '1 cup green peas', '1 onion chopped', '2 tomatoes chopped', '1 tsp turmeric', '1 tsp cumin seeds', '2 tbsp mustard oil', 'Salt to taste']
recipe_name: Tarkari with Chiura - Vegetable Curry with Beaten Rice

cooking_method: ['- Knead flour, salt and water into smooth dough. Rest 30 minutes.', 'Mix chopped cabbage, onion, garlic, ginger, spices, oil and salt for filling.', 'Roll dough into small circles, add filling, pleat and seal.', 'Steam in greased steamer for 15-18 minutes.', 'Serve hot with spicy tomato achar.']
ingredients: ['300g all-purpose flour', '150ml warm water', '1/2 tsp salt', '400g cabbage finely chopped', '2 large onions finely chopped', '4 cloves garlic minced', '1 inch ginger minced', '1 tsp cumin powder', '2 tbsp mustard oil', 'Salt to taste']

cooking_method: ['- Prepare steamed momos first.', 'Heat oil in a large pan or wok.', 'Add cumin, chilies and onion. Stir-fry 1 minute.', 'Add steamed momos and fry on medium-high heat until crispy and golden (8-10 minutes).', 'Toss with soy sauce and chili powder. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['40 steamed momos (from recipe #104)', '3 tbsp vegetable oil', '1 tsp cumin', '2 green chilies', '1 onion sliced', '1 tbsp soy sauce', '1/2 tsp chili powder']

cooking_method: ['- Steam momos as usual.', 'Heat oil, sauté onion, garlic, ginger. Add tomato puree and spices.', 'Pour in stock, bring to boil and simmer 10 minutes.', 'Add steamed momos to the soup and cook 3-4 minutes.', 'Garnish with cilantro and serve immediately.']
ingredients: ['40 momos', '4 cups chicken or vegetable stock', '1 onion chopped', '2 tomatoes pureed', '4 cloves garlic', '1 inch ginger', '1 tsp turmeric', '2 tsp momo masala', '2 tbsp oil', 'Fresh cilantro']
recipe_name: Jhol Momo - Momo in Spicy Soup

cooking_method: ['- Steam momos.', 'Heat oil in wok. Stir-fry garlic, chilies, onion and capsicum on high heat.', 'Add tomato sauce, soy sauce and salt.', 'Toss steamed momos in the chilli mixture until well coated.', 'Serve hot as a spicy snack.']
ingredients: ['40 steamed momos', '1 large onion cubed', '1 capsicum cubed', '6-8 green chilies', '4 cloves garlic', '2 tbsp tomato sauce', '2 tbsp soy sauce', '2 tbsp oil', 'Salt']

cooking_method: ['- Heat oil in a non-stick pan.', 'Place momos flat side down. Cook 2-3 minutes until base is golden.', 'Add water, cover and steam 5-6 minutes.', 'Remove lid and fry until crispy. Drizzle soy sauce.', 'Serve with achar.']
ingredients: ['40 uncooked or steamed momos', '2 tbsp oil', '1/2 cup water', '2 tbsp soy sauce']

cooking_method: ['- Prepare small steamed momos.', 'Bring broth to boil with ginger, soy sauce, salt and pepper.', 'Add momos and simmer 4-5 minutes.', 'Garnish with green onions.', 'Serve as comforting soup.']
ingredients: ['40 small momos', '5 cups clear chicken broth', '2 tbsp soy sauce', '1 tsp ginger julienned', '2 green onions chopped', 'Salt and pepper']

cooking_method: ['- Mix yogurt, tandoori masala, ginger-garlic, chili and salt.', 'Marinate steamed momos for 30 minutes.', 'Grill or bake at 200°C for 10-12 minutes, basting with oil.', 'Serve with mint chutney.']
ingredients: ['40 momos', '1/2 cup yogurt', '2 tbsp tandoori masala', '1 tbsp ginger-garlic paste', '1 tsp red chili powder', '2 tbsp oil', 'Salt']

cooking_method: ['- Make larger, thinner wrappers.', 'Place filling in center without fully sealing (open top).', 'Steam or pan-fry 12-15 minutes.', 'Top with cheese and herbs before serving.']
ingredients: ['Dough for 20 large wrappers', '300g chicken or veg filling', '1 cup cheese grated', 'Onion, capsicum, cilantro']

cooking_method: ['- Prepare dough as usual.', 'Mix corn, onion, chilies, cumin, oil and salt for filling.', 'Fill, shape and steam for 15 minutes.', 'Serve with tomato achar.']
ingredients: ['300g flour for dough', '1.5 cups sweet corn kernels', '1 onion chopped', '3 green chilies', '1 tsp cumin', '2 tbsp oil', 'Salt']

cooking_method: ['- Sauté mushrooms with onion and garlic until moisture evaporates. Add spices.', 'Cool filling, then stuff into momo wrappers.', 'Steam 15-18 minutes. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['300g flour', '400g finely chopped mushrooms', '2 onions', '4 garlic cloves', '1 tsp garam masala', '2 tbsp oil', 'Salt']

cooking_method: ['- Mix crumbled paneer with chopped onion, chilies, spices and salt.', 'Fill and steam momos for 12-15 minutes.', 'Serve with spicy achar.']
ingredients: ['300g flour', '300g paneer crumbled', '1 large onion', '3 green chilies', '1 tsp cumin powder', 'Fresh cilantro', 'Salt']

cooking_method: ['- Prepare sweet dough.', 'Fill with chocolate pieces and sugar.', 'Steam gently for 8-10 minutes.', 'Serve warm as dessert.']
ingredients: ['300g flour', '200g dark chocolate chopped', '2 tbsp sugar', '1 tsp cinnamon', '1 banana mashed (optional)']

cooking_method: ['- Mix minced buff with finely chopped onion, garlic, ginger, spices and oil.', 'Fill wrappers and steam 18-20 minutes until cooked.', 'Serve with jhol or achar.']
ingredients: ['300g flour', '400g minced buffalo meat', '2 onions', '4 garlic', '1 inch ginger', '1 tsp cumin', '2 tbsp mustard oil', 'Salt']

cooking_method: ['Same as standard momo method with chicken filling. Steam 15-18 minutes.']
ingredients: ['300g flour', '400g minced chicken', '2 large onions', '4 garlic cloves', '1 inch ginger', 'Fresh cilantro', '1 tsp coriander powder', '2 tbsp oil', 'Salt']

cooking_method: ['Mix pork with spices and aromatics. Fill, seal and steam 18 minutes.']
ingredients: ['300g flour', '400g minced pork', '2 onions finely chopped', '3 green chilies', '1 tsp timur', '2 tbsp mustard oil', 'Salt']

cooking_method: ['Mix chopped prawns with seasoning. Steam 12-15 minutes.']
ingredients: ['300g flour', '300g chopped prawns', '1 onion', '3 garlic', '1 tsp ginger', '1 tsp cumin', 'Salt']

cooking_method: ['- Mix rice flour, banana, sugar, milk and cardamom into smooth batter. Rest 30 minutes.', 'Heat oil in a wok.', 'Pour batter in ring shape using a ladle or hand into hot oil.', 'Fry on medium heat until golden on both sides.', 'Drain and serve warm.', 'Following the provided culinary reference, here are the recipes for dishes 121 through 140.']
ingredients: ['2 cups rice flour', '1 ripe banana mashed', '1/2 cup sugar', '1 cup milk or water', '1/2 tsp cardamom powder', 'Oil for deep frying']

cooking_method: ['Mix rice flour, sugar, ghee, and cardamom with water to create a thick, smooth batter; let it rest for a few hours. Heat a flat-bottomed pan with oil. Pour the batter by hand or funnel in a continuous ring shape into the hot oil. Fry until golden brown and crispy on both sides. Serve hot with a side of spicy tomato achar.']
ingredients: ['4 cups rice flour', '1 cup sugar', '1/2 cup ghee', '2 cups water', 'Vegetable oil for deep frying', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom powder', '1 cup Tomato Achar (Recipe #606)']

cooking_method: ['Mix the mashed potatoes with salt, cilantro, and ginger-garlic paste; form into small flat patties. Make a thick batter using gram flour, turmeric, chilli powder, and water. Dip each potato patty into the batter to coat thoroughly. Deep fry in hot oil until the exterior is golden and crunchy.']
ingredients: ['4 large potatoes (boiled and mashed)', '1 cup gram flour (besan)', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', '1/2 teaspoon red chilli powder', '1/2 teaspoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Oil for deep frying', '1/4 cup chopped cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Sauté the chopped bamboo shoots (tama) briefly and mix them into the mashed potatoes. Season the mixture with salt and cumin powder, then shape into discs. Dip the discs into a seasoned gram flour batter. Fry in hot oil until crispy. The fermented bamboo adds a unique tangy flavor to the traditional potato fritter.']
ingredients: ['3 large potatoes (boiled and mashed)', '1/2 cup fermented bamboo shoots (fine chopped)', '1 cup gram flour', '1/2 teaspoon cumin powder', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Oil for frying']

cooking_method: ['Create a firm dough with flour, oil, and water. For the filling, sauté cumin seeds, potatoes, and peas with garam masala and salt. Roll out small circles of dough, cut in half, and fold into cones. Stuff with the potato mixture and seal the edges with water. Deep fry on low-to-medium heat until golden brown.']
ingredients: ['2 cups all-purpose flour', '4 tablespoons oil (for dough)', '3 large potatoes (boiled and cubed)', '1/2 cup green peas', '1 teaspoon garam masala', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Oil for deep frying']

cooking_method: ['Briefly smash the samosas into a shallow bowl. Pour hot pea curry over the samosas. Top with a dollop of yogurt, tamarind chutney, and chopped onions. Sprinkle with chaat masala and sev for a burst of flavor and texture.']
ingredients: ['2 prepared Samosas (Recipe #124)', '1 cup yellow pea curry (Matar)', '2 tablespoons yogurt', '1 tablespoon tamarind chutney', '1/4 cup chopped onions', '1/4 teaspoon chaat masala', '2 tablespoons sev (crunchy noodles)']

cooking_method: ['Prepare the "pani" by mixing water with mint-coriander paste, tamarind, black salt, and cumin. Mix mashed potatoes with chickpeas and spices for the filling. Poke a hole in each puri, fill with a small amount of the potato mixture, and dip into the spicy water. Eat immediately in one bite.']
ingredients: ['20-30 hollow fried puris', '2 large potatoes (boiled and mashed)', '1/2 cup boiled chickpeas', '1 liter mint-coriander water (spicy)', '1 tablespoon tamarind pulp', '1 teaspoon black salt', '1/2 teaspoon cumin powder']

cooking_method: ['This variation uses a sweeter tamarind water and often includes sprouted beans in the filling. Prepare the semolina puris (or buy pre-made). Fill with sprouts and a mix of sweet and spicy water. Season with chaat masala before serving.']
ingredients: ['20-30 semolina puris', '1 cup boiled sprouted moong beans', '1 cup sweet tamarind water', '1 teaspoon chaat masala', '1/2 teaspoon chilli powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['In a large bowl, combine puffed rice, sev, and peanuts. Add the onions, tomatoes, and both chutneys. Toss quickly to prevent the puffed rice from getting soggy. Serve immediately as a light, crunchy snack.']
ingredients: ['2 cups puffed rice', '1/4 cup sev', '1/4 cup roasted peanuts', '1 small onion (chopped)', '1 tomato (chopped)', '2 tablespoons tamarind chutney', '1 tablespoon green chutney', '1/2 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Arrange the flat puris on a plate. Place a small portion of mashed potato on each puri. Drizzle with garlic and sweet chutneys. Generously cover each puri with sev until the potato is no longer visible. Garnish with cilantro.']
ingredients: ['10 flat crispy puris', '1 large potato (boiled and mashed)', '1/2 cup sev', '2 tablespoons garlic chutney', '1 tablespoon sweet chutney', '1/4 cup chopped cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Prepare the puris as you would for pani puri by filling them with potatoes. Instead of spicy water, fill each puri to the brim with chilled, sweetened yogurt. Top with tamarind chutney, a pinch of chilli powder, and a sprinkle of sev.']
ingredients: ['10 hollow puris', '1/2 cup thick sweetened yogurt (Dahi)', '1/2 cup mashed potatoes', '2 tablespoons tamarind chutney', '1/2 teaspoon red chilli powder', '1/4 cup sev']

cooking_method: ['In a bowl, combine puffed rice, crushed noodles, chickpeas, and potatoes. Add mustard oil, lemon juice, green chillies, and timur salt. Shake or stir vigorously until well mixed. This is a quintessential Nepali street food known for its sharp, tangy, and spicy kick.']
ingredients: ['2 cups puffed rice', '1/2 cup dry instant noodles (crushed)', '1/4 cup boiled chickpeas', '1 small potato (boiled and diced)', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '1 lemon (juiced)', '1 teaspoon Szechuan pepper (timur) salt', '2 green chillies (chopped)']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil in a pan and add turmeric. Add the beaten rice and fry on medium heat, stirring constantly. Cook until the chiura becomes crispy and light. Stir in salt and peanuts. This is a common tea-time snack.']
ingredients: ['2 cups beaten rice (chiura)', '2 tablespoons vegetable oil', '1/4 teaspoon turmeric', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/4 cup roasted peanuts']

cooking_method: ['Coat the peanuts in a light batter of gram flour, spices, and a small amount of water. Deep fry in small batches until the coating is crisp and the peanuts are roasted. Dust with extra chaat masala while still warm.']
ingredients: ['2 cups raw peanuts', '1/2 cup gram flour', '1 teaspoon red chilli powder', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', '1/2 teaspoon chaat masala', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Oil for frying']

cooking_method: ['Roast the corn directly over an open flame or charcoal grill, turning frequently until the kernels are charred and cooked through. Rub the hot corn with the lemon half dipped in the salt-chilli mixture.']
ingredients: ['1 whole ear of fresh corn', '1/2 lemon', '1 teaspoon salt mixed with chilli powder']

cooking_method: ['Heat ghee or oil in a heavy-bottomed pot with a lid. Add turmeric and corn kernels. Cover and shake the pot occasionally until the popping sounds stop. Season with salt and serve warm.']
ingredients: ['1/2 cup dried corn kernels', '2 tablespoons ghee or mustard oil', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/4 teaspoon turmeric']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil and sauté the dried meat (sukuti) until it becomes slightly crunchy. Add onions and ginger-garlic paste, cooking until fragrant. Season with cumin and salt. This serves as a chewy, protein-rich snack or side dish.']
ingredients: ['2 cups dried meat pieces', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon cumin powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1 onion (sliced)']

cooking_method: ['Fry the red chillies and timur in oil until dark. Add the buffalo sukuti and turmeric. Sauté until the meat is well-browned and has absorbed the spices. This is a very popular accompaniment to local beverages.']
ingredients: ['2 cups dried buffalo meat', '3 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon Szechuan pepper (timur)', '2 dried red chillies', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', '1/2 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Sauté the dried chicken strips in oil until golden. Add ginger and chilli powder, stirring well. Finish with salt and a squeeze of lemon juice to balance the savory flavors.']
ingredients: ['2 cups dried chicken strips', '2 tablespoons oil', '1 teaspoon ginger paste', '1/2 teaspoon red chilli powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1 tablespoon lemon juice']

cooking_method: ['Heat a generous amount of oil in a pan. Deep fry or shallow fry the dried meat until it puffs up slightly and becomes very crispy. Drain excess oil and season with salt.']
ingredients: ['2 cups assorted sukuti', '1/4 cup vegetable oil', '1/2 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['In a large bowl, mix the fried sukuti with onions, roasted tomatoes, and chillies. Drizzle with raw mustard oil and lemon juice for an authentic pungent kick. Toss with cilantro and serve as a spicy salad-style appetizer.']
ingredients: ['2 cups fried sukuti', '1 small red onion (chopped)', '2 tomatoes (roasted and chopped)', '3 green chillies (finely sliced)', '1 tablespoon raw mustard oil', '1 tablespoon lemon juice', '1/4 cup fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['In a bowl, mix sukuti, gram flour, onion, green chilies, ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder,']
ingredients: ['200g sukuti (dried buff/chicken meat, finely chopped or pounded)', '1 cup gram flour (besan)', '1 small onion (finely chopped)', '2 green chilies (finely chopped)', '1 teaspoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1 teaspoon coriander powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt (or to taste)', 'Water as needed', 'Oil for deep frying']

cooking_method: ['In a bowl, combine gram flour, all vegetables, green chilies, ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, coriander powder, ajwain, and salt. Add water gradually to make a thick batter coating the vegetables. Heat oil. Drop small clusters of vegetable batter into oil. Fry until golden and crispy (4–5 minutes). Drain on paper towel. Serve with green chutney or tomato achar.']
ingredients: ['1 cup gram flour (besan)', '1 small onion (thinly sliced)', '1 small potato (thinly sliced)', '1/4 cup spinach leaves (chopped)', '1/4 cup cauliflower florets (small)', '2 green chilies (chopped)', '1 teaspoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon coriander powder', '1/2 teaspoon ajwain (carom seeds)', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Water as needed', 'Oil for deep frying']

cooking_method: ['Separate onion slices. In a bowl, add gram flour, rice flour, green chilies, ginger paste, turmeric, chili powder, cumin, ajwain, and salt. Add water gradually to make a thick batter. Add onions and mix until well coated. Heat oil. Drop small batches of onion batter into oil. Fry until deep golden and crispy (3–4 minutes). Drain. Serve hot with mint chutney.']
ingredients: ['2 large onions (thinly sliced)', '1 cup gram flour (besan)', '2 tablespoons rice flour (for crispiness)', '2 green chilies (chopped)', '1 teaspoon ginger paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1/2 teaspoon ajwain (carom seeds)', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Water as needed', 'Oil for deep frying']

cooking_method: ['In a bowl, mix gram flour, corn flour, ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, garam masala, and salt. Add water to make a thick batter. Dip each spinach leaf into the batter, coating both sides. Heat oil. Gently drop battered spinach leaves into oil. Fry until crispy and golden (2–3 minutes per batch). Drain on paper towel. Serve immediately.']
ingredients: ['2 cups fresh spinach leaves (washed and dried)', '3/4 cup gram flour (besan)', '2 tablespoons corn flour', '1 teaspoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1/2 teaspoon garam masala', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Water as needed', 'Oil for deep frying']

cooking_method: ['Drain soaked moong dal completely. Coarsely grind dal without water (use little water if needed, but batter should be thick). Add onion, green chilies, ginger, cilantro, turmeric, chili powder, cumin seeds, asafoetida, and salt. Mix well. Heat oil. Drop spoonfuls of batter into oil. Fry until golden brown and crispy (3–4 minutes). Drain. Serve with tamarind chutney.']
ingredients: ['1 cup yellow moong dal (soaked for 3 hours)', '1 small onion (finely chopped)', '2 green chilies (chopped)', '1 tablespoon ginger (grated)', '1/4 cup fresh cilantro (chopped)', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1/2 teaspoon asafoetida (hing)', '1 teaspoon salt', 'Oil for deep frying']

cooking_method: ['In a bowl, mix gram flour, rice flour, ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, garam masala, chaat masala, and salt. Add water to make a thick, coating batter. Dip paneer cubes into batter, ensuring even coating. Heat oil. Fry coated paneer cubes in batches until golden and crispy (2–3 minutes). Drain. Sprinkle extra chaat masala. Serve hot with green chutney.']
ingredients: ['250g paneer (cut into 1-inch cubes)', '3/4 cup gram flour (besan)', '2 tablespoons rice flour', '1 teaspoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1/2 teaspoon garam masala', '1/2 teaspoon chaat masala', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Water as needed', 'Oil for deep frying']

cooking_method: ['Mix gram flour, rice flour, ginger paste, turmeric, chili powder, garam masala, and salt. Add water to make a thick batter. For filling (optional): mix mashed potatoes, chaat masala, salt, green chilies, and cilantro. Spread filling on one bread slice, cover with another slice. Cut diagonally. Dip bread sandwiches into batter, coating well. Heat oil. Fry until golden and crispy (2–3 minutes per side). Drain. Serve with tomato ketchup or green chutney.']
ingredients: ['8 slices of white or brown bread', '1 cup gram flour (besan)', '2 tablespoons rice flour', '1 teaspoon ginger paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1/2 teaspoon garam masala', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Water as needed', 'Oil for deep frying']

cooking_method: ['In a bowl, mix gram flour, rice flour, ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, cumin powder, and salt. Add water to make a thick batter. Dip potato rounds into batter, coating both sides. Heat oil. Fry battered potato slices in batches until golden and crispy (3–4 minutes). Drain. Sprinkle chaat masala. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['2 large potatoes (cut into 1/4-inch rounds)', '1 cup gram flour (besan)', '2 tablespoons rice flour', '1 teaspoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1/2 teaspoon chaat masala', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Water as needed', 'Oil for deep frying']

cooking_method: ['Puri:\xa0Mix flour, salt, and 1 tbsp oil. Add water gradually and knead into stiff dough. Rest 15 minutes. Roll into small circles. Heat oil for frying. Fry each puri until puffed and golden (30 seconds per side). Drain.\nTarkari:\xa0Heat oil, add cumin seeds, then onion; sauté until golden. Add ginger paste, turmeric, chili powder, coriander; cook 1 minute. Add tomato puree and salt; cook until oil separates. Add potatoes and water; simmer 5 minutes. Garnish with cilantro. Serve puri with hot tarkari.']
recipe_name: Puri Tarkari (Fried Bread with Potato Curry)

cooking_method: ['Make puri as in #149. For aloo chana: heat oil, add cumin seeds and onion; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, coriander, cumin; cook 2 minutes. Add tomato puree and salt; cook until oil separates. Add potatoes, chickpeas, and water. Simmer 10 minutes. Add garam masala and cilantro. Serve puri with aloo chana.']

['In a bowl, mix gram flour, rice flour, ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, cumin powder, and salt. Add water to make a thick batter. Dip eggplant rounds into batter, coating both sides. Heat oil. Fry battered eggplant in batches until golden and crispy (3–4 minutes). Drain. Sprinkle chaat masala. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['1 large eggplant (cut into 1/4-inch rounds)', '1 cup gram flour (besan)', '2 tablespoons rice flour', '1 teaspoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1/2 teaspoon chaat masala', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Water as needed', 'Oil for deep frying']

cooking_method: ['Blanch cauliflower florets in hot water for 2 minutes. Drain and pat dry. In a bowl, mix gram flour, corn flour, ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, garam masala, ajwain, and salt. Add water to make thick batter. Dip each floret into batter. Heat oil. Fry until golden and crispy (3–4 minutes). Drain. Serve with mint chutney.']
ingredients: ['1 medium cauliflower (cut into medium florets)', '1 cup gram flour (besan)', '2 tablespoons corn flour', '1 teaspoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon garam masala', '1/2 teaspoon ajwain (carom seeds)', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Water as needed', 'Oil for deep frying']

cooking_method: ['Marinate chicken with corn flour, all-purpose flour, egg, salt, and pepper for 30 minutes. Deep fry until crispy and golden (5–6 minutes). Drain. In a wok, heat 3 tbsp oil, add garlic, ginger, green chilies; sauté 1 minute. Add onion and capsicum; stir-fry on high for 2 minutes. Add soy sauce, chili sauce, ketchup, sugar; mix. Add fried chicken; toss well for 2 minutes. Garnish with spring onions. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['500g boneless chicken (cubed)', '2 tablespoons corn flour', '2 tablespoons all-purpose flour', '1 egg', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 teaspoon black pepper powder', 'Oil for deep frying', '3 tablespoons oil (for stir fry)', '2 tablespoons garlic (chopped)', '2 tablespoons ginger (chopped)', '4 green chilies (slit)', '1 large onion (cubed)', '1 large capsicum (cubed)', '3 tablespoons soy sauce', '2 tablespoons red chili sauce', '1 tablespoon tomato ketchup', '1 teaspoon sugar', '2 tablespoons spring onions (chopped)']

cooking_method: ['Marinate pork with corn flour, all-purpose flour, egg, salt, pepper, and ginger-garlic paste for 30 minutes. Deep fry until crispy and fully cooked (6–8 minutes). Drain. In a wok, heat 3 tbsp oil, add garlic, ginger, green chilies; sauté 1 minute. Add onion and capsicum; stir-fry on high for 2 minutes. Add soy sauce, chili sauce, ketchup, sugar; mix. Add fried pork; toss well. Garnish with spring onions. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['500g boneless pork (cubed small)', '2 tablespoons corn flour', '2 tablespoons all-purpose flour', '1 egg', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 teaspoon black pepper powder', '1 teaspoon ginger-garlic paste', 'Oil for deep frying', '3 tablespoons oil (for stir fry)', '2 tablespoons garlic (chopped)', '2 tablespoons ginger (chopped)', '4 green chilies (slit)', '1 large onion (cubed)', '1 large capsicum (cubed)', '3 tablespoons soy sauce', '2 tablespoons red chili sauce', '1 tablespoon tomato ketchup', '1 teaspoon sugar', '2 tablespoons spring onions (chopped)']

cooking_method: ['Coat mushrooms with corn flour, all-purpose flour, salt, pepper, and ginger-garlic paste. Deep fry until crispy (3–4 minutes). Drain. In a wok, heat 2 tbsp oil, add garlic, ginger, green chilies; sauté 1 minute. Add onion and capsicum; stir-fry 2 minutes. Add soy sauce, chili sauce, ketchup, sugar; mix. Add fried mushrooms; toss gently for 2 minutes. Garnish with spring onions. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['400g button mushrooms (quartered)', '3 tablespoons corn flour', '2 tablespoons all-purpose flour', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 teaspoon black pepper powder', '1 teaspoon ginger-garlic paste', 'Oil for deep frying', '2 tablespoons oil (for stir fry)', '1 tablespoon garlic (chopped)', '1 tablespoon ginger (chopped)', '3 green chilies (slit)', '1 onion (cubed)', '1 capsicum (cubed)', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', '2 tablespoons red chili sauce', '1 tablespoon tomato ketchup', '1/2 teaspoon sugar', '2 tablespoons spring onions']

cooking_method: ['In a bowl, mix oil, ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, cumin, coriander, garam masala, fenugreek powder, and salt. Add chicken cubes, coat well. Marinate in refrigerator for 4–6 hours (preferably overnight). Thread chicken onto skewers. Grill on charcoal grill (preferred) or in oven at 200°C (400°F) for 10–12 minutes, turning occasionally, until charred and cooked through. Serve hot with green chutney and timur (Szechuan pepper) powder.']
ingredients: ['600g boneless chicken (cut into 1-inch cubes)', '4 tablespoons mustard oil', '4 tablespoons ginger-garlic paste', '2 tablespoons turmeric powder', '2 tablespoons red chili powder', '2 tablespoons cumin powder', '2 tablespoons coriander powder', '1 tablespoon garam masala', '1 tablespoon fenugreek powder (optional)', '2 teaspoons salt', 'Wooden or metal skewers']

cooking_method: ['Mix all spices, oil, and ginger-garlic paste. Add buffalo cubes, coat well. Marinate 6–8 hours (or overnight). Thread onto skewers. Grill on charcoal until charred outside and tender inside (15–20 minutes, turning frequently). Buffalo is tougher than chicken, so cook until no longer pink. Serve with roasted timur powder and tomato achar.']
ingredients: ['600g buffalo meat (cut into 1-inch cubes)', '5 tablespoons mustard oil', '4 tablespoons ginger-garlic paste', '2 tablespoons turmeric powder', '2 tablespoons red chili powder', '2 tablespoons cumin powder', '2 tablespoons coriander powder', '1 tablespoon garam masala', '1 tablespoon fenugreek powder', '1 tablespoon timur (Szechuan pepper) powder', '2 teaspoons salt', 'Wooden or metal skewers']

cooking_method: ['Mix oil, spices, and ginger-garlic paste. Add pork cubes, coat well. Marinate 4–6 hours. Thread pork onto skewers. Grill on charcoal or pan-grill over medium heat for 12–15 minutes, turning often, until pork is caramelized and fully cooked. Serve with green chutney, onion slices, and timur powder.']
ingredients: ['600g pork shoulder (cut into 1-inch cubes)', '4 tablespoons mustard oil', '4 tablespoons ginger-garlic paste', '2 tablespoons turmeric powder', '2 tablespoons red chili powder', '2 tablespoon cumin powder', '2 tablespoon coriander powder', '1 tablespoon garam masala', '1 tablespoon timur powder', '2 teaspoons salt', 'Wooden or metal skewers']

cooking_method: ['Combine oil, all spices, and ginger-garlic paste. Marinate goat meat for 6–8 hours (longer for better tenderness). Thread onto skewers. Grill on charcoal for 15–20 minutes, turning frequently, until meat is charred on outside and fully cooked inside. Serve with spicy achar and beaten rice (chiura).']
ingredients: ['600g goat meat (bone-in or boneless, cut into chunks)', '5 tablespoons mustard oil', '4 tablespoons ginger-garlic paste', '2 tablespoons turmeric powder', '2 tablespoons red chili powder', '2 tablespoons cumin powder', '2 tablespoons coriander powder', '1 tablespoon garam masala', '1 tablespoon fenugreek powder', '1 tablespoon timur powder', '2 teaspoons salt', 'Wooden or metal skewers']

cooking_method: ['In a bowl, mix oil, ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, cumin, coriander, garam masala, timur, salt, and lemon juice. Add prawns, coat well. Marinate 30 minutes. Thread prawns onto skewers. Grill over high heat for 2–3 minutes per side until pink and slightly charred (do not overcook). Serve immediately with lemon wedges and green chutney.']
ingredients: ['500g large prawns (peeled, deveined, tails on)', '3 tablespoons mustard oil', '2 tablespoons ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1 teaspoon coriander powder', '1/2 teaspoon garam masala', '1/2 teaspoon timur powder', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons lemon juice', 'Wooden or metal skewers']

cooking_method: ['Marinate cubed paneer in mustard oil, ginger-garlic paste, timur, cumin, turmeric, chili, garam masala, lemon juice, and salt for 20 minutes. Skewer and grill over charcoal or in a hot oven at 200°C for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally until charred edges form. Garnish with cilantro and serve hot with chutney.']
ingredients: ['400g paneer (cubed)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon timur powder (Sichuan pepper)', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1 teaspoon turmeric', '1 teaspoon chili powder', '1/2 teaspoon garam masala', 'juice of 1 lemon', 'salt to taste', 'chopped cilantro for garnish']

cooking_method: ['Beat eggs with salt, fry into thin omelets in mustard oil. Fill paratha with omelet, onions, tomato, chilies, chaat masala, and black salt. Roll tightly, optional grill briefly for crispiness. Slice and serve with tamarind chutney.']
ingredients: ['4 parathas or rotis', '4 eggs (beaten)', '1 onion (sliced)', '1 tomato (chopped)', '2 green chilies (chopped)', '1 teaspoon chaat masala', '1/2 teaspoon black salt', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', 'salt to taste']

cooking_method: ['Stir-fry cabbage, carrot, sprouts, onions, and ginger in oil for 5 minutes, add soy and chili sauce, cool. Wrap filling in wrappers, seal with water, deep-fry in hot oil until golden and crisp, about 3-4 minutes per side. Drain and serve with dipping sauce.']
ingredients: ['8 spring roll wrappers', '1 cup cabbage (shredded)', '1 carrot (julienned)', '1/2 cup bean sprouts', '2 green onions (chopped)', '1 teaspoon ginger (minced)', '1 tablespoon soy sauce', '1 teaspoon chili sauce', 'oil for frying']

cooking_method: ['Mash boiled veggies with cumin, garam masala, salt, and cilantro. Sauté onions in mustard oil, mix in veggies. Spread yogurt on roti, add filling, roll up. Toast on tawa until warm and crisp outside.']
ingredients: ['4 rotis or parathas', '1 cup mixed veggies (potato, carrot, peas - boiled)', '1 onion (sliced)', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1/2 teaspoon garam masala', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', 'chopped cilantro', 'salt to taste', 'yogurt for spreading']

cooking_method: ['Boil noodles, drain. Heat oil, stir-fry garlic, ginger, onions, carrot, pepper, and cabbage for 5 minutes. Add soy sauce and noodles, toss on high heat for 3-5 minutes until coated and slightly crispy. Garnish with green onions.']
ingredients: ['300g egg noodles (boiled)', '1 cup cabbage (shredded)', '1 carrot (sliced)', '1 bell pepper (sliced)', '1 onion (sliced)', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', '1 teaspoon garlic paste', '1 teaspoon ginger paste', '2 tablespoons oil', 'green onions for garnish']

cooking_method: ['Boil and drain noodles. Sauté garlic and ginger in sesame oil, add veggies, stir-fry until tender-crisp. Toss in sauces, noodles, salt, and pepper; wok-fry 4 minutes for flavor infusion.']
ingredients: ['300g chowmein noodles', '2 cups mixed veggies (broccoli, beans, carrot)', '1 teaspoon sesame oil', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', '1 teaspoon chili sauce', '2 garlic cloves (minced)', '1 inch ginger (grated)', 'salt and pepper to taste']

cooking_method: ['Marinate chicken in ginger-garlic and soy. Boil noodles. Stir-fry chicken until cooked, add veggies, then noodles and sauces, high-heat toss for 5 minutes.']
ingredients: ['300g noodles', '300g chicken (sliced)', '1 cup cabbage', '1 carrot', '1 onion', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', '1 teaspoon oyster sauce (optional)', 'ginger-garlic paste 1 tbsp', 'oil']

cooking_method: ['Tenderize buffalo meat with timur and garlic in oil, cook 10 minutes. Add veggies, then boiled noodles and soy, stir-fry vigorously.']
ingredients: ['300g noodles', '300g buffalo meat (thin strips)', 'veggies: cabbage, carrot, onion (1 cup each)', '2 tbsp soy sauce', '1 tsp timur powder', 'mustard oil 2 tbsp', 'garlic 3 cloves']

cooking_method: ['Simmer broth with tomato puree, spices, and veggies 20 minutes. Boil noodles separately, combine, garnish with cilantro and lemon.', "Ingredients:\xa0('2 cups flour', '1 tsp carom seeds', 'oil, salt')\nCooking Method (Recipe):\xa0Knead spiced dough, cut diamonds, deep-fry crisp.", 'ogurt with spices and nuts.']
ingredients: ['200g noodles', '4 cups veg broth', '1 cup mixed veggies', '1 tomato (pureed)', '1 tsp cumin', '1 tsp chili powder', 'cilantro, lemon']
