cooking_method: ['Boil chicken in 5 cups water with salt, ginger, garlic, turmeric, cumin, and coriander for 20 minutes until tender; shred half the chicken and reserve broth (reduce to 4 cups). In a pot, heat 1 tablespoon oil, sauté onions for 3 minutes until soft, add carrots and cabbage, stir-fry 5 minutes. Pour in reserved broth, soy sauce, and remaining cubed chicken; simmer 10 minutes for flavors to meld. Boil noodles separately for 5 minutes, drain, and divide into bowls. Ladle hot soup over noodles, squeeze lemon juice, and garnish with cilantro and green onions.']
ingredients: ['200g noodles (egg or wheat)', '300g chicken (boneless, cubed)', '4 cups chicken broth', '1 carrot (sliced)', '1 cup cabbage (shredded)', '1 onion (sliced)', '2 garlic cloves (minced)', '1-inch ginger (grated)', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1 teaspoon coriander powder', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', 'juice of 1 lemon', 'fresh cilantro and green onions for garnish', 'salt to taste']

cooking_method: ['Heat sesame oil in a pot over medium heat, sauté garlic for 1 minute until fragrant. Add carrots, broccoli, beans, and tofu; stir-fry 4 minutes to lightly brown edges. Pour in vegetable stock, soy sauce, and chili flakes; bring to boil then simmer 15 minutes until veggies are tender. Meanwhile, boil noodles in salted water for 4-5 minutes until al dente, drain well. Divide noodles into bowls, ladle soup over top, and sprinkle with cilantro for freshness.']
ingredients: ['200g noodles', '4 cups vegetable stock', '1 cup tofu (cubed)', '1 cup mixed veggies (broccoli florets, beans)', '1 carrot (sliced)', '2 garlic cloves (minced)', '1 teaspoon sesame oil', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', '1/2 teaspoon chili flakes', 'fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Knead flour and water into firm dough, rest covered 15 minutes; divide into 4 balls. Bring broth to boil with onion, garlic, ginger, tomato, and chicken/veggies; simmer 20 minutes. For noodles: flatten one dough ball thin (like tortilla), cut into 1-inch squares, gently pull/stretch each into irregular strips (thenthuk style) directly into boiling broth—do in batches to avoid sticking. Cook 3-5 minutes until noodles float and soften. Repeat with remaining dough. Garnish with cilantro and chilies before serving hot.']
ingredients: ['2 cups all-purpose flour (for dough)', '1/2 cup water (for dough)', '4 cups chicken or veg broth', '200g chicken or veggies (diced)', '1 onion (chopped)', '2 garlic cloves', '1 teaspoon ginger paste', '1 tomato (chopped)', 'cilantro and green chilies for garnish']

cooking_method: ['Melt jaggery with 2 tablespoons water over low heat until syrupy (5 minutes), stir in coconut and cardamom, cook 5 minutes to thicken filling, cool. Knead rice flour with boiling water into smooth, non-sticky dough (add flour if needed). Pinch off golf-ball-sized portions, flatten into 3-inch discs, place 1 teaspoon filling in center, fold and pinch into fish-like teardrop shape, sealing well. Steam in steamer or on banana leaves over boiling water for 12-15 minutes until glossy and firm. Cool slightly before eating—Yomari Punhi festival special.']
ingredients: ['2 cups glutinous rice flour', '1 cup water (for dough)', '1 cup grated coconut', '1/2 cup jaggery or brown sugar', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom powder', 'banana leaves for steaming (optional)']

cooking_method: ['Dry-roast sesame seeds until aromatic (3 minutes), grind coarsely, mix with melted jaggery and ghee over low heat for 7 minutes into thick paste, add cardamom, cool. Prepare rice flour dough as in Yomari #173. Shape dough into cups, fill with sesame-jaggery (1 teaspoon each), seal into pointed dumplings. Arrange on steamer tray, steam vigorously 15 minutes until translucent. These nutty, chewy treats are a Newari variation for festivals.']
ingredients: ['2 cups rice flour', '1 cup water', '1 cup roasted sesame seeds (ground)', '3/4 cup jaggery (grated)', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom', '1 tablespoon ghee']

cooking_method: ['Mix flour, ajwain, salt, and ghee into crumbly texture, add water gradually to form stiff dough; knead 5 minutes, rest 10 minutes covered. Divide into 2 balls, roll each into 1/8-inch thick circle, cut into diamond shapes with pastry cutter or knife. Heat oil to 180°C (medium-hot), fry nimki in batches 2-3 minutes per side until golden and bubbly, drain on paper towels. Cool completely for crunch—perfect tea-time snack.']
ingredients: ['2 cups all-purpose flour', '1 teaspoon ajwain (carom seeds)', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons ghee or oil', '1/2 cup water', 'oil for deep-frying']

cooking_method: ['Dissolve salt in water, knead with flour and 1 tablespoon ghee into soft dough, rest 15 minutes. Divide into 4 balls; roll one into 6-inch disc, spread 1 teaspoon ghee, fold into square, roll again gently to 5-inch square (preserving layers). Heat tawa, shallow-fry each on medium heat 2 minutes per side with ghee drizzles until flaky, golden layers puff up. Stack and serve warm with curry or pickle.']
ingredients: ['2 cups maida (refined flour)', '1/2 cup warm water', '4 tablespoons ghee (melted)', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'oil for shallow-frying']

cooking_method: ["Core and slice apples uniformly thin using mandoline; toss immediately in lemon juice to prevent browning. Optional: dissolve sugar in 1/4 cup water for syrup, dip slices briefly. Arrange on dehydrator trays or parchment-lined baking sheets; dry at 50-60°C (dehydrator) or 100°C oven door ajar for 4-6 hours until crisp and leathery—no moisture left. Dust with cinnamon, cool, store airtight. Famous from Mustang region's sun-dried apples."]
ingredients: ['4 firm apples (thinly sliced, 1/16-inch)', '1 tablespoon lemon juice', '2 tablespoons sugar (optional syrup)', 'cinnamon powder (pinch)']

cooking_method: ['Hang yogurt in muslin cloth 4-6 hours to thicken (or use Greek yogurt). Whisk hung yogurt vigorously 5 minutes for creamy texture, fold in sugar gradually until dissolved. Add cardamom, half the pistachios, raisins, and saffron soaked in warm milk. Chill 1 hour to set flavors. Serve in clay pots garnished with remaining nuts—creamy Newari festival dessert.']
ingredients: ['2 cups thick yogurt (hung/straining overnight)', '1/4 cup powdered sugar', '1 teaspoon cardamom powder', '2 tablespoons chopped pistachios', '1 tablespoon raisins', 'pinch of saffron (optional)']

cooking_method: ['Boil milk in heavy-bottomed pan, reduce to medium, add soaked drained rice; stir occasionally 25-30 minutes until rice softens and milk thickens to 1/3 volume. Lower heat, stir in sugar until dissolved (5 minutes), add cardamom and saffron. Simmer 5 more minutes without boiling. Turn off heat, mix in half the fried nuts. Cool to warm, garnish with rest—serve as dessert or festival prasad.']
ingredients: ['1/2 cup basmati rice (soaked 30 min)', '1 liter full-fat milk', '1/2 cup sugar (adjust)', '1 teaspoon cardamom powder', '10 cashews and almonds (chopped, fried)', '1/4 teaspoon saffron strands']

cooking_method: ['Boil sugar and water 5 minutes into thin syrup, keep warm. Heat ghee in wide pan over medium, add semolina, roast stirring constantly 8-10 minutes until deep golden and aromatic (watch to avoid burning). Lower heat, pour hot syrup gradually while stirring vigorously to prevent lumps—mixture will bubble. Add cardamom, cook 5 minutes until ghee separates and haluwa pulls from pan sides. Stir in almonds, serve hot in mounds.', '# Nepali Dishes Recipes (81–100)']
ingredients: ['1 cup semolina (suji/fine)', '1/2 cup ghee', '1 cup sugar', '2 cups water (for syrup)', '1 teaspoon cardamom powder', '10 almonds (slivered)']

cooking_method: ['Heat ghee in a heavy-bottomed pan over medium heat. Add semolina and roast slowly while stirring continuously until it turns golden brown and releases a nutty aroma. In another saucepan, warm the milk and dissolve the sugar into it. Gradually pour the hot milk mixture into the roasted semolina while stirring constantly to avoid lumps. Cook until the mixture thickens and absorbs the liquid. Add cardamom powder, raisins, cashews, and almonds. Stir for another 2–3 minutes and serve warm.']
ingredients: ['1 cup fine semolina (suji)', '1/2 cup ghee', '3/4 cup sugar', '2 1/2 cups whole milk', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom powder', '2 tablespoons chopped cashews', '2 tablespoons raisins', '1 tablespoon sliced almonds']

cooking_method: ['Heat ghee in a deep pan and sauté grated carrots for 5–7 minutes until slightly softened. Pour in milk and simmer on low heat, stirring occasionally until the milk reduces significantly. Add sugar and continue cooking until the mixture thickens and becomes glossy. Mix in cardamom powder and dry fruits. Cook for another few minutes before serving warm.']
ingredients: ['4 cups freshly grated carrots', '3 cups full cream milk', '4 tablespoons ghee', '1/2 cup sugar', '1/4 teaspoon cardamom powder', '2 tablespoons chopped pistachios', '2 tablespoons chopped cashews', '1 tablespoon raisins']

cooking_method: ['Cook grated carrots in ghee over medium heat until aromatic. Add milk and simmer until the carrots become soft and the milk evaporates. Stir in sugar and continue cooking until the haluwa thickens. Add cardamom powder, almonds, and raisins. Serve hot or warm.']
ingredients: ['4 cups red carrots grated', '3 cups milk', '1/2 cup sugar', '4 tablespoons ghee', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom powder', '2 tablespoons sliced almonds', '2 tablespoons raisins']

cooking_method: ['Drain soaked moong dal and grind into a coarse paste. Heat ghee in a pan and cook the dal paste slowly on low heat, stirring continuously until golden and aromatic. Warm milk and sugar separately. Slowly add the milk mixture into the roasted dal while stirring constantly. Cook until thick and smooth. Finish with cardamom powder and nuts before serving.']
ingredients: ['1 cup split yellow moong dal soaked overnight', '1/2 cup ghee', '3/4 cup sugar', '2 cups milk', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom powder', '2 tablespoons chopped cashews', '1 tablespoon sliced pistachios']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil in a wok over high heat. Sauté garlic and onions until fragrant. Add mixed vegetables and stir-fry until slightly tender but still crisp. Add cooled rice and toss well to separate the grains. Stir in soy sauce, salt, and black pepper. Continue stir-frying for several minutes until heated through. Garnish with spring onions and serve hot.']
ingredients: ['3 cups cooked and cooled rice', '1 cup mixed vegetables diced', '2 tablespoons oil', '2 cloves garlic minced', '1 small onion chopped', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', '1/2 teaspoon black pepper', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 spring onions chopped']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil in a wok and scramble the beaten eggs until just cooked. Remove and set aside. In the same wok sauté garlic, carrots, and peas until tender. Add chilled rice and stir-fry over high heat. Mix in soy sauce, salt, and pepper. Return scrambled eggs to the wok and toss everything together before serving.']
ingredients: ['3 cups cooked rice chilled', '3 eggs beaten', '1/2 cup carrots finely diced', '1/2 cup peas', '2 tablespoons oil', '2 cloves garlic minced', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', '1 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon black pepper']

cooking_method: ['Season chicken lightly with salt and pepper. Heat oil in a wok and cook chicken pieces until golden and fully cooked. Add garlic, carrots, and cabbage and stir-fry over high heat. Add rice and mix thoroughly. Pour in soy sauce and seasonings. Toss continuously until the rice is evenly coated and hot. Garnish with spring onions.']
ingredients: ['3 cups cooked rice', '1 cup boneless chicken breast diced', '1/2 cup carrots diced', '1/2 cup cabbage shredded', '2 tablespoons oil', '2 cloves garlic minced', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', '1 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon white pepper', '2 spring onions sliced']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil in a wok and sauté garlic until aromatic. Add all vegetables and stir-fry on high heat until slightly crunchy. Add cooked rice and mix carefully. Season with soy sauce, salt, and pepper. Continue stir-frying until all ingredients are heated through and evenly combined.']
ingredients: ['3 cups cooked rice', '1/2 cup carrots diced', '1/2 cup beans chopped', '1/2 cup cabbage shredded', '1/4 cup capsicum diced', '2 tablespoons oil', '2 cloves garlic minced', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', '1 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon pepper']

cooking_method: ['Cook eggs into soft scrambled pieces and set aside. In the same pan cook chicken until lightly browned. Add garlic and vegetables and stir-fry briefly. Add rice and toss over high heat. Mix in soy sauce, salt, pepper, scrambled eggs, and chicken. Stir continuously for even flavor distribution.']
ingredients: ['4 cups cooked rice', '1/2 cup chicken pieces', '2 eggs beaten', '1/2 cup mixed vegetables', '2 tablespoons oil', '2 cloves garlic minced', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', '1 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon black pepper']

cooking_method: ['Blend mint, coriander, green chillies, tamarind pulp, cumin powder, and black salt with chilled water to prepare spicy pani. Mix mashed potatoes and chickpeas for stuffing. Crack the top of each puri shell, fill with stuffing, and pour in the spicy water just before serving.']
ingredients: ['24 crispy puri shells', '2 potatoes boiled and mashed', '1/2 cup boiled chickpeas', '1 cup mint leaves', '1/2 cup coriander leaves', '2 green chillies', '1 teaspoon roasted cumin powder', '1 tablespoon tamarind pulp', '4 cups chilled water', '1 teaspoon black salt']

cooking_method: ['Combine puffed rice, onion, tomato, and potato in a large bowl. Add tamarind chutney, green chutney, and chaat masala. Toss quickly to coat evenly. Top with sev and coriander leaves. Serve immediately to maintain crispness.']
ingredients: ['4 cups puffed rice', '1/2 cup sev', '1 onion finely chopped', '1 tomato chopped', '1 boiled potato diced', '2 tablespoons tamarind chutney', '1 tablespoon green chutney', '1 teaspoon chaat masala', '2 tablespoons coriander leaves chopped']

cooking_method: ['Grind soaked urad dal into a fluffy batter. Deep fry small portions until golden brown. Soak fried bhallas briefly in warm water and squeeze gently. Arrange in a serving bowl and pour whisked yogurt over them. Sprinkle cumin powder, chilli powder, salt, and drizzle tamarind chutney before serving chilled.']
ingredients: ['1 cup urad dal soaked overnight', '3 cups yogurt whisked', '1 teaspoon roasted cumin powder', '1 tablespoon tamarind chutney', '1 teaspoon red chilli powder', '1 teaspoon salt', 'oil for frying']

cooking_method: ['Mix mashed potatoes with cornflour, spices, chilli, and coriander leaves. Shape into flat patties. Heat oil on a skillet and shallow fry the tikkis until crisp and golden brown on both sides. Serve hot with chutney.']
ingredients: ['4 potatoes boiled and mashed', '2 tablespoons cornflour', '1 green chilli chopped', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1 teaspoon garam masala', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons coriander leaves chopped', '2 tablespoons oil']

cooking_method: ['Arrange hot aloo tikkis on serving plates. Spoon yogurt generously over them. Drizzle tamarind and green chutneys. Sprinkle chaat masala, chilli powder, and sev. Serve immediately.']
ingredients: ['8 aloo tikkis prepared', '1 cup yogurt whisked', '2 tablespoons tamarind chutney', '2 tablespoons green chutney', '1 teaspoon chaat masala', '1/2 teaspoon red chilli powder', '2 tablespoons sev']

cooking_method: ['Prepare potato filling by sautéing mustard seeds, chillies, turmeric, and mashed potatoes. Shape into balls, dip in gram flour batter, and deep fry until golden. Slice pav buns and spread garlic chutney inside. Place fried vada inside each bun and serve hot.']
ingredients: ['4 pav buns', '4 potatoes boiled and mashed', '1 teaspoon mustard seeds', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '2 green chillies chopped', '1 tablespoon garlic chutney', '1 cup gram flour batter', 'oil for frying', '1 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Cook potatoes, cauliflower, and peas until soft then mash together. Heat butter in a pan and sauté onions and tomatoes until soft. Add pav bhaji masala and mashed vegetables. Cook while stirring until thick and flavorful. Toast pav buns with butter and serve alongside the bhaji.']
ingredients: ['3 potatoes boiled', '1 cup cauliflower florets', '1/2 cup peas', '2 tomatoes chopped', '1 onion chopped', '2 tablespoons butter', '2 tablespoons pav bhaji masala', '1 teaspoon salt', '5 pav buns']

cooking_method: ['Combine boiled corn with onion, tomato, green chilli, and coriander leaves. Add chaat masala, lemon juice, and salt. Toss thoroughly and serve immediately as a fresh snack.']
ingredients: ['2 cups boiled sweet corn kernels', '1 onion finely chopped', '1 tomato chopped', '1 green chilli chopped', '1 teaspoon chaat masala', '1 tablespoon lemon juice', '2 tablespoons coriander leaves chopped', '1/2 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Place sprouts in a mixing bowl and add onion, tomato, cucumber, and green chilli. Season with cumin powder, lemon juice, and salt. Mix well and serve fresh.']
ingredients: ['2 cups mixed sprouts steamed lightly', '1 onion chopped', '1 tomato chopped', '1 cucumber diced', '1 teaspoon roasted cumin powder', '1 tablespoon lemon juice', '1 green chilli chopped', '1 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Combine boiled chickpeas with onion, tomato, green chilli, and coriander leaves. Add lemon juice, black salt, and chaat masala. Toss until evenly mixed and serve chilled or at room temperature.']
ingredients: ['2 cups boiled black chickpeas', '1 onion finely chopped', '1 tomato chopped', '1 green chilli chopped', '1 teaspoon chaat masala', '1 tablespoon lemon juice', '2 tablespoons coriander leaves', '1/2 teaspoon black salt']

cooking_method: ['Prepare the sesame sauce by blending roasted sesame seeds, roasted tomatoes, soaked red chillies, garlic, mustard oil, salt, and lemon juice into a smooth paste. Steam the momos until fully cooked and soft. Serve hot momos with the rich sesame dipping sauce on the side.']
ingredients: ['25 steamed vegetable momos', '1/2 cup roasted sesame seeds', '2 tomatoes roasted', '3 dry red chillies soaked', '2 cloves garlic', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 tablespoon lemon juice']

cooking_method: ['Marinate chicken pieces with ginger-garlic paste, salt, pepper and egg for 20 minutes, then coat with mixed cornflour and plain flour. Deep fry the chicken in hot oil until golden and crispy, then drain on paper towels. In a separate pan heat 2 tablespoons oil, sauté minced garlic until fragrant, add honey, soy sauce and chili flakes and cook until the sauce thickens slightly. Toss the fried chicken pieces in this sauce until well coated. Garnish with sesame seeds and serve immediately.']
ingredients: ['500g boneless chicken cut into bite-size pieces', '2 tbsp ginger-garlic paste', '1 tsp salt', '1/2 tsp black pepper', '1 egg', '4 tbsp cornflour', '4 tbsp plain flour', 'Oil for deep frying', '2 tbsp oil for sauce', '4 garlic cloves minced', '3 tbsp honey', '2 tbsp soy sauce', '1 tsp chili flakes', '1 tbsp sesame seeds']

cooking_method: ['Parboil potato fingers for 3-4 minutes, drain and pat dry. Toss with cornflour and salt, then deep fry until golden and extra crispy. Heat oil in a wok, stir-fry garlic, green chilies, onion and capsicum on high heat for 1-2 minutes. Add tomato ketchup, soy sauce, chili powder and vinegar, mix well. Add the crispy potatoes and toss quickly to coat evenly. Garnish with chopped spring onions and serve hot.']
ingredients: ['4 large potatoes cut into fingers', '2 tbsp cornflour', '1 tsp salt', 'Oil for deep frying', '1 large onion cubed', '1 capsicum cubed', '6-8 green chilies slit', '4 garlic cloves minced', '2 tbsp tomato ketchup', '1 tbsp soy sauce', '1 tsp chili powder', '1 tsp vinegar', 'Spring onions for garnish']

cooking_method: ['Heat butter in a pan, sauté onion and garlic until soft and fragrant. Add sliced mushrooms and cook on medium-high heat until all moisture evaporates and mushrooms turn golden. Season with salt, pepper and oregano. Cook for another 2 minutes. Spoon the creamy mushroom mixture generously over hot buttered toast. Garnish with fresh herbs and serve immediately as a delicious snack.']
ingredients: ['300g button mushrooms sliced', '1 small onion finely chopped', '3 cloves garlic minced', '2 tbsp butter', '1/2 tsp black pepper', '1/2 tsp dried oregano', 'Salt to taste', '4 slices of bread toasted', 'Fresh parsley or cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Lightly butter the bread slices on one side. Mix grated cheese with onion, tomato, green chilies and black pepper. Spread this mixture evenly on the bread. Toast on a tawa or in a sandwich maker until the cheese melts and bread turns golden and crispy on both sides. Cut diagonally and serve hot.']
ingredients: ['4 slices bread', '100g grated cheese (mozzarella or processed)', '1 small onion finely chopped', '1 tomato deseeded and chopped', '2 green chilies chopped', '1/2 tsp black pepper', 'Butter for spreading']

cooking_method: ['Mix mashed potato with onion, green chilies, cumin powder and salt. Spread the mixture on one slice of bread, cover with another slice to make a sandwich. Lightly butter the outer sides and toast on a hot tawa until both sides are golden and crisp. Cut into triangles and serve with tomato ketchup or achar.']
ingredients: ['8 slices white bread', '2 boiled potatoes mashed', '1 onion chopped', '2 green chilies', '1/2 tsp cumin powder', 'Salt to taste', 'Butter or ghee', 'Tomato ketchup']

cooking_method: ['Mix softened butter with chaat masala, chili powder and black salt. Spread generously on both sides of the bread slices. Toast on a tawa until crispy. Top with chopped onion, tomato and cilantro. Sprinkle extra chaat masala and serve immediately as a spicy flavorful snack.']
ingredients: ['4 slices bread', '2 tbsp butter', '1 tsp chaat masala', '1/2 tsp red chili powder', '1/4 tsp black salt', '1 small onion finely chopped', '1 tomato chopped', 'Fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Cook noodles according to package instructions and set aside. Heat oil in a pot, sauté garlic, ginger and onion. Add carrot and cabbage, stir-fry for 2 minutes. Pour in stock, add turmeric, salt and pepper and bring to boil. Crack eggs directly into the simmering soup and stir gently. Add cooked noodles and simmer for 3-4 minutes. Garnish with cilantro and serve hot.']
ingredients: ['200g egg noodles', '4 cups chicken or vegetable stock', '2 eggs', '1 carrot julienned', '1 cup cabbage shredded', '1 onion sliced', '4 cloves garlic minced', '1 inch ginger minced', '1 tsp turmeric', '2 tbsp oil', 'Salt and pepper', 'Fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Mix minced meat with green onions, garlic, ginger and soy sauce to make filling. Place a small amount of filling in the center of each wonton wrapper, wet edges and fold into triangles or desired shape. Bring chicken broth to boil, season with salt and pepper. Gently drop wontons into the soup and cook for 5-6 minutes until they float. Add spinach or bok choy in the last 2 minutes. Serve hot in bowls.']
ingredients: ['20-24 wonton wrappers', '200g minced chicken or pork', '2 green onions chopped', '2 cloves garlic minced', '1 tsp ginger minced', '1 tsp soy sauce', '5 cups chicken broth', '1 cup spinach or bok choy', 'Salt and pepper']

cooking_method: ['Bring broth to a boil with garlic, ginger and soy sauce. Add mixed vegetables and cook for 3 minutes. Gently add dumplings and simmer for 6-8 minutes until fully cooked and floating. Adjust seasoning. Ladle into bowls and garnish generously with chopped spring onions and cilantro before serving.']
ingredients: ['20-24 ready or homemade dumplings/momos', '5 cups vegetable or chicken broth', '2 cloves garlic', '1 tsp ginger', '1 tbsp soy sauce', '1 cup mixed vegetables julienned', 'Spring onions and cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Mix chicken mince with finely chopped green onions, garlic, ginger, soy sauce and sesame oil. Place filling in wonton wrappers and seal properly. For crispy version, deep fry in hot oil until golden. For steamed version, steam for 10-12 minutes. Serve with chili sauce or soy dipping sauce.']
ingredients: ['200g chicken mince', '20-24 wonton wrappers', '2 green onions', '2 garlic cloves', '1 tsp ginger', '1 tsp soy sauce', '1/2 tsp sesame oil', 'Oil for deep frying or steaming']

cooking_method: ['Peel and clean the corn cobs. Grill on charcoal, gas stove or oven at 200°C, turning regularly until kernels are tender and slightly charred. Mix softened butter with salt, chili powder and lime juice. Brush this flavored butter generously over hot grilled corn. Sprinkle with cilantro and serve immediately.']
ingredients: ['4 fresh corn on the cob', '4 tbsp butter', '1 tsp salt', '1/2 tsp chili powder', '1 tsp lime juice', 'Fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Heat butter in a pan and toss boiled corn kernels for 2-3 minutes. Remove from heat and mix with chaat masala, chili powder, black salt, lemon juice, chopped onion and cilantro. Toss everything well so the spices coat the corn evenly. Serve warm as a quick tangy snack.']
ingredients: ['2 cups sweet corn kernels boiled', '1 tbsp butter', '1 tsp chaat masala', '1/2 tsp red chili powder', '1/2 tsp black salt', '1 tbsp lemon juice', '1 small onion finely chopped', 'Fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Spread mint chutney on one slice and ketchup on another. Layer with tikka pieces, onion and tomato slices, sprinkle chaat masala. Close the sandwich and butter the outer sides. Toast on a tawa or sandwich maker until golden and crispy on both sides. Cut diagonally and serve hot.']
ingredients: ['8 bread slices', '300g paneer or chicken tikka pieces', '1 onion sliced', '1 tomato sliced', '4 tbsp mint-coriander chutney', '4 tbsp tomato ketchup', 'Butter for toasting', 'Chaat masala']

cooking_method: ['Toast bread slices lightly. Spread mayonnaise on one layer, arrange lettuce, tomato, cucumber and egg. Add another slice with chicken and sauces. Top with third slice. Secure with toothpicks and cut into quarters. Serve with fries and extra sauce.']
ingredients: ['12 bread slices', '4 boiled eggs sliced', '200g grilled chicken', '1 cucumber sliced', '2 tomatoes sliced', 'Lettuce leaves', 'Mayonnaise', 'Tomato sauce', 'Butter']

cooking_method: ['Toast burger buns with butter. Cook or heat veg patties until crispy. Spread mayonnaise on bottom bun, place lettuce, patty, cheese, tomato and onion. Add ketchup on top bun and close. Grill the assembled burger lightly for 1-2 minutes on each side. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['4 burger buns', '4 veg patties', '1 onion sliced', '1 tomato sliced', 'Lettuce', '4 cheese slices', 'Mayonnaise', 'Tomato ketchup', 'Butter']

cooking_method: ['Toast buns with butter. Cook chicken patties until juicy and golden. Assemble by spreading sauces on buns, layering lettuce, chicken patty, cheese, onion and tomato. Close and lightly grill the burger. Serve immediately with fries.']
ingredients: ['4 burger buns', '4 chicken patties or grilled chicken fillets', 'Onion and tomato slices', 'Lettuce', 'Cheese slices', 'Mayonnaise and chili sauce', 'Butter']

cooking_method: ['Toast buns with butter. Fry eggs sunny side up with salt and pepper. Assemble buns with mayonnaise, lettuce, fried egg, cheese, tomato and onion. Close the burger and serve hot with ketchup.']
ingredients: ['4 burger buns', '4 fried eggs', '1 onion sliced', '1 tomato sliced', 'Lettuce', 'Cheese slices', 'Mayonnaise', 'Butter', 'Black pepper']

cooking_method: ['Cut potatoes into even fingers, soak in cold water for 15 minutes then pat completely dry. Deep fry in hot oil until golden and crispy. Drain and toss immediately with salt, pepper and garlic powder. Serve hot with spicy chili sauce for dipping.']
ingredients: ['4 large potatoes', 'Oil for deep frying', '1 tsp salt', '1/2 tsp black pepper', '4 tbsp chili sauce or tomato-chili mix', '1 tsp garlic powder']

cooking_method: ['Prepare and deep fry potato fingers until extra crispy. While still hot, toss generously with chaat masala, chili powder, cumin powder and black salt. Sprinkle chopped cilantro and serve immediately with lemon wedges on the side.']
ingredients: ['4 large potatoes', 'Oil for frying', '1 tsp chaat masala', '1/2 tsp red chili powder', '1/2 tsp cumin powder', '1/4 tsp black salt', 'Fresh cilantro chopped', 'Lemon wedges']

cooking_method: ['In a large bowl, combine the puffed rice, crushed noodles, onions, tomatoes, and chickpeas. Drizzle with raw mustard oil and lemon juice to create a pungent base. Season with salt, chillies, and timur powder. Toss or shake vigorously in a container until every grain is coated and serve immediately before it loses its crunch.']
ingredients: ['2 cups puffed rice', '1/2 cup dry instant noodles (crushed)', '1 small onion (finely chopped)', '1 tomato (seeded and diced)', '1/4 cup boiled chickpeas', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 tablespoon lemon juice', '1/2 teaspoon timur (Szechuan pepper) powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '2 green chillies (chopped)']

cooking_method: ['Mix the flours with water to form a soft, pliable dough. Pull off small pieces and roll them between your palms to create irregular, jagged stick shapes. Deep fry in hot oil until they are completely dehydrated and crunchy. While still hot, toss them in a bowl with extra chilli powder and chaat masala.']
ingredients: ['1 cup rice flour', '1/4 cup gram flour (besan)', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', '1 teaspoon red chilli powder', '1/2 teaspoon chaat masala', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Water for dough', 'Oil for deep frying']

cooking_method: ['Mix besan, ajwain, turmeric, and salt with just enough water to make a thick paste. Press the paste through a bhujiya maker (or a slotted spoon) directly into hot oil. Fry until light golden and crisp. Drain and mix with fried peanuts and curry leaves for a classic tea-time accompaniment.']
ingredients: ['2 cups gram flour (besan)', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', '1/2 teaspoon carom seeds (ajwain)', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/4 cup water', 'Oil for deep frying', '1/4 cup fried peanuts', '1/4 cup fried curry leaves']

cooking_method: ['In a large dry bowl, combine the fried chiura and roasted soybeans. Add coconut slivers and raisins for a touch of sweetness. Season with salt and pepper. This is a common travel snack used in the hilly regions of Nepal.']
ingredients: ['1 cup bhuteko chiura (fried beaten rice)', '1/2 cup roasted soybeans (bhatmas)', '1/4 cup roasted coconut slivers', '1/4 cup raisins', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/4 teaspoon black pepper']

cooking_method: ['Combine all the nuts and dried fruits in a glass jar. If a sweeter, stickier version is desired, lightly glaze with honey and bake at a low temperature for 10 minutes to set.']
ingredients: ['1/2 cup almonds', '1/2 cup cashews', '1/2 cup dried dates (chopped)', '1/4 cup dried figs', '1/4 cup walnuts', '1 tablespoon honey (optional)']

cooking_method: ['Coat the dried chickpeas in oil, turmeric, and cumin. Spread them on a baking tray and roast at 200°C for 30-40 minutes, shaking the tray occasionally, until they are golden and crunchy. Sprinkle with salt immediately after removing from the heat.']
ingredients: ['2 cups boiled chickpeas (dried thoroughly)', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon cumin powder']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil in a pan and add the peanuts. Fry on medium-low heat, stirring constantly, until the skins darken and the peanuts start to "pop." Drain excess oil and toss with salt and chilli powder while hot.']
ingredients: ['2 cups raw skin-on peanuts', '1/4 cup oil', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/4 teaspoon red chilli powder']

cooking_method: ['Roast the cashews in ghee on low heat until they turn a pale golden brown. Remove from the pan and immediately toss with black salt, pepper, and amchur for a savory, tangy finish.']
ingredients: ['1 cup whole cashews', '1 tablespoon ghee', '1/2 teaspoon black salt', '1/2 teaspoon black pepper powder', '1/4 teaspoon dried mango powder (amchur)']

cooking_method: ['In a non-stick pan, melt honey and sugar until bubbly. Add the peanuts and stir quickly to coat. Sprinkle salt and cinnamon. Spread on parchment paper to cool and harden into a sweet, crunchy cluster.']
ingredients: ['1 cup roasted peanuts', '2 tablespoons honey', '1 tablespoon sugar', '1/4 teaspoon salt', '1/4 teaspoon cinnamon powder']

cooking_method: ['Toast the sesame seeds until fragrant. Melt jaggery with water and ghee in a pan until it reaches a "hard ball" consistency (test by dropping a bit in cold water). Quickly mix in the toasted sesame seeds. While the mixture is still warm, grease your palms with ghee and roll into small, firm balls.']
ingredients: ['2 cups white or black sesame seeds', '1 cup jaggery (chaku/molasses)', '1 tablespoon ghee', '1/4 cup water']

cooking_method: ['Sauté the shredded coconut in ghee for 2 minutes. Add condensed milk and cardamom powder. Cook on low heat until the mixture thickens and leaves the sides of the pan. Let it cool slightly, then shape into balls. Roll the balls in extra dry coconut for garnish.']
ingredients: ['2 cups shredded coconut', '1 cup sweetened condensed milk', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom powder', '1 tablespoon ghee']

cooking_method: ['Roast besan in ghee on low heat for 15-20 minutes until it turns aromatic and golden brown. Let it cool to lukewarm. Add powdered sugar and cardamom. Mix well and shape into firm balls, pressing an almond on top of each.']
ingredients: ['2 cups gram flour (besan)', '1/2 cup ghee', '1 cup powdered sugar', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom powder', '1 tablespoon chopped almonds']

cooking_method: ['Cut the boiled eggs into halves. Heat oil in a pan and add turmeric and chilli powder. Place the eggs yolk-side down and fry for 2 minutes. Flip and fry the other side. Serve topped with fresh onions, cilantro, and a sprinkle of salt.']
ingredients: ['4 hard-boiled eggs', '1 tablespoon oil', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', '1/2 teaspoon red chilli powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/4 cup chopped onions', '1 tablespoon chopped cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Brush each sausage with chilli sauce. Cut the puff pastry into strips and wrap around each sausage. Brush the pastry with the egg wash and sprinkle with pepper. Bake at 200°C for 15 minutes until the pastry is golden and puffed.']
ingredients: ['8 chicken or buff sausages', '1 puff pastry sheet (thawed)', '1 tablespoon hot chilli sauce', '1 egg (beaten)', '1/2 teaspoon black pepper']

cooking_method: ['Parboil the wedges for 5 minutes, then drain and dry. Toss with cornstarch, chilli powder, and salt. Deep fry in hot oil until crispy. Season with oregano while hot.']
ingredients: ['4 medium potatoes (cut into wedges)', '1 tablespoon cornstarch', '1/2 teaspoon red chilli powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Oil for frying', '1/2 teaspoon dried oregano']

cooking_method: ['Make a thick batter with gram flour, spices, and water. Dip the cheese cubes into the batter to coat fully. Deep fry until the coating is golden and the cheese inside is soft and melted.']
ingredients: ['200g paneer or hard cheese (cubed)', '1 cup gram flour', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon carom seeds', 'Oil for deep frying']

cooking_method: ['Mix the mashed vegetables with spices and ginger-garlic paste. Form into heart or oval shapes. Coat with breadcrumbs and shallow fry on both sides until crisp and brown.']
ingredients: ['2 cups mashed boiled vegetables (potato, carrot, peas)', '1/2 cup breadcrumbs', '1/2 teaspoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon garam masala', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Oil for shallow frying']

cooking_method: ['Mix fish, potatoes, lemon juice, and spices. Shape into small patties. Dip in egg wash, then coat with breadcrumbs. Fry until golden brown.']
ingredients: ['2 cups boiled, deboned fish', '1 cup mashed potatoes', '1 tablespoon lemon juice', '1/2 teaspoon pepper', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1 egg (beaten)', '1/2 cup breadcrumbs', 'Oil for frying']

cooking_method: ['Combine minced meat with potatoes and spices. Form into patties, coat with egg and breadcrumbs, and fry until the exterior is crunchy and the meat is heated through.']
ingredients: ['2 cups minced mutton (cooked)', '1 cup mashed potatoes', '1 teaspoon garam masala', '1/2 teaspoon red chilli powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1 egg', '1/2 cup breadcrumbs', 'Oil for frying']

cooking_method: ['Mix chicken, onions, and spices. Shape into flat discs. Coat with breadcrumbs and fry until the chicken is fully cooked and the crust is golden.']
ingredients: ['2 cups minced chicken', '1/2 cup finely chopped onions', '1 teaspoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/2 cup breadcrumbs', 'Oil for shallow frying']

cooking_method: ['Mix corn flour, all-purpose flour, chili powder, cumin, salt, beaten egg, and buttermilk into thick batter (pancake consistency); rest 10 minutes. Pat dry corncobs/sausages, dip fully in batter coating evenly. Heat oil to 180°C, fry in batches 4-5 minutes turning until golden and crispy outside, inner cooked through. Drain on paper towels, serve hot with chili sauce.']
ingredients: ['8 small corncobs or sausages on sticks', '1 cup corn flour', '1/2 cup all-purpose flour', '1 egg (beaten)', '1 cup buttermilk', '1 teaspoon chili powder', '1/2 teaspoon cumin powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'oil for deep-frying', 'chili sauce for serving']

cooking_method: ['Combine grated cheese/paneer, mashed potato, cornstarch, ginger, chilies, garam masala, and salt into smooth dough; chill 10 minutes. Form into 1-inch balls, roll in breadcrumbs. Heat oil medium-hot, deep-fry balls 3-4 minutes until golden and cheese melts inside without bursting. Drain, serve with tomato ketchup or chutney.']
ingredients: ['200g mozzarella or paneer (grated)', '1 cup boiled mashed potato', '2 tablespoons cornstarch', '1 teaspoon ginger paste', '2 green chilies (chopped)', '1/2 teaspoon garam masala', 'salt to taste', 'breadcrumbs for coating', 'oil for frying']

cooking_method: ['Mix puffed rice, cucumber, onion, tomatoes, and chilies in bowl. Sprinkle chaat masala, black salt, lemon juice; toss gently to coat without sogginess. Garnish with cilantro, serve immediately as fresh monsoon snack bhel variation.']
ingredients: ['2 cups puffed rice (muri)', '1 cucumber (diced)', '1 onion (chopped)', '2 tomatoes (diced)', '2 green chilies (chopped)', '1 teaspoon chaat masala', '1/2 teaspoon black salt', 'juice of 1 lemon', 'chopped cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Mash chickpeas lightly, mix with potato cubes, onion, chutneys, cumin, and salt. Mound into plates, top with sev. Serve as quick rainy-day chaat with tangy-spicy balance.']
ingredients: ['1 cup chickpeas (boiled)', '1 potato (boiled, cubed)', '1 onion (finely chopped)', '2 tablespoons tamarind chutney', '1 teaspoon chili sauce', '1/2 teaspoon roasted cumin powder', 'salt to taste', 'sev or crushed chips for topping']

cooking_method: ['Skewer boiled baby corns. Whisk besan, rice flour, chili, soda, salt with water to thick batter. Dip corns, deep-fry 3-4 minutes until crisp golden. Drain, sprinkle chaat masala, serve hot.']
ingredients: ['12 baby corns (boiled)', '1/2 cup besan (chickpea flour)', '1 teaspoon rice flour', '1/2 teaspoon chili powder', '1/4 teaspoon baking soda', 'salt to taste', 'water to make batter', 'oil for frying']

cooking_method: ['Grind soaked dal coarsely with minimal water. Mix in onion, chilies, ginger, cumin, salt. Drop spoonfuls into hot oil, fry 4-5 minutes until pakoda-style crisp outside, soft inside. Drain, serve with green chutney.']
ingredients: ['1 cup moong dal (soaked)', '1 onion (chopped)', '2 green chilies', '1 teaspoon ginger paste', '1/2 teaspoon cumin seeds', 'salt to taste', 'oil for frying']

cooking_method: ['Coat plantain slices in rice flour slurry (flour + water). Shallow-fry 2-3 minutes per side until caramelized golden. Drain, dust with sugar-cardamom mix. Sweet fried banana chips alternative.']
ingredients: ['2 plantains (sliced)', '1/2 cup rice flour', '1/4 cup powdered sugar', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom powder', 'oil for shallow-frying']

cooking_method: ['Marinate sliced lotus stem in spiced water 10 minutes. Dip in besan-ajwain-chili batter, deep-fry 4 minutes until crunchy. Drain, serve with mint chutney—uncommon delicacy.']
ingredients: ['200g lotus stem (boiled, sliced)', '1/2 cup besan batter', '1 teaspoon ajwain seeds', '1/2 teaspoon chili powder', 'salt', 'oil']

cooking_method: ['Toss hot boiled edamame/peas in sesame oil, timur, chili, salt, lemon. Roast briefly in pan 2 minutes for spice toast. Numbing-spicy pod snack.']
ingredients: ['1 cup edamame or green peas (boiled)', '1 tablespoon sesame oil', '1 teaspoon timur powder', '1/2 teaspoon chili flakes', 'salt', 'lemon juice']

cooking_method: ['Cube boiled sweet potatoes, sauté in ghee 5 minutes. Pour hot jaggery syrup, simmer 10 minutes until glazed. Add cardamom, nuts. Warm sweet fritter-style treat.']
ingredients: ['4 sweet potatoes (boiled)', '1/2 cup jaggery syrup', '1 teaspoon ghee', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom', 'chopped nuts']

cooking_method: ['Mix warm corn with toasted coconut, honey, salt. Chill briefly. Tropical-style sweet-savory corn salad.']
ingredients: ['2 cups boiled corn kernels', '1/2 cup coconut flakes', '1/4 cup honey', 'pinch salt']

cooking_method: ['Melt jaggery-ghee, stir in puffed millet and nuts, spread thin, cool to brittle. Break into shards—crunchy energy snack.']
ingredients: ['1 cup puffed millet', '2 tablespoons ghee', '1/4 cup jaggery', 'nuts']

cooking_method: ['Peel eggs, dip in spiced besan batter, deep-fry 3 minutes golden. Drain, serve with achar—mini scotch egg Nepali twist.']
ingredients: ['12 quail eggs or small eggs (boiled)', '1/2 cup spiced flour batter', 'oil for frying']

cooking_method: ['Chop bamboo, mix into batter with chili-cumin, drop fritters, fry crisp 4 minutes. Tangy fermented pakoda.']
ingredients: ['1 cup fermented bamboo tips', '1/2 cup chickpea batter', 'spices']

cooking_method: ['Toss sprouted moong with chopped veggies, lemon, masala. No-cook healthy sprout chaat.']
ingredients: ['2 cups sprouted moong', 'onion-tomato salad', 'lemon-chaat masala']

cooking_method: ['Mash seeds lightly, coat batter, fry until crunchy outside. Seasonal seed fritters.']
ingredients: ['200g jackfruit seeds (boiled)', 'spiced besan coating', 'oil']

cooking_method: ['Toss roasted foxnuts in warm honey-spice glaze, cool to clusters. Nutty sweet crunch.']
ingredients: ['1 cup roasted foxnuts', '1/4 cup honey', 'spices']

cooking_method: ['Dip bread cubes in spiced egg, shallow-fry 3 minutes, top with onion relish. Bread pakoda variation.']
ingredients: ['4 bread slices (cubed)', 'egg batter', 'onion-chili mix']

cooking_method: ['Chop fruits, bind with warm jaggery-cardamom syrup, roll into balls. No-bake energy laddus.']
ingredients: ['2 cups mixed dried fruits', 'jaggery syrup', 'cardamom']

cooking_method: ['Mix popped amaranth with melted ghee-jaggery, press flat, cut squares. Nutritious sweet bars.']
ingredients: ['1 cup amaranth (popped)', 'ghee', 'jaggery']

cooking_method: ['Grease a flat plate or tray with ghee. In a heavy-bottomed pan, melt jaggery with water on low heat. Stir continuously until jaggery dissolves. Increase heat to medium and boil until the mixture reaches hard-ball stage (120°C / 250°F on candy thermometer). To test: drop a little into cold water - it should form a hard, brittle ball. Immediately pour onto greased plate. Sprinkle sesame seeds and walnuts. Let cool for 5 minutes, then grease hands and pull/stretch the mixture slightly. Score into squares before completely hard. Once set, break into pieces. Serve during Maghe Sankranti.']
ingredients: ['2 cups jaggery (grated)', '1/4 cup water', '2 tablespoons ghee (for greasing)', '2 tablespoons white sesame seeds (lightly roasted)', '1 tablespoon chopped walnuts (optional)']

cooking_method: ['Boil water with salt in a pot. Add yam chunks. Boil for 15–20 minutes until fork-tender. Drain water. In a bowl, mix boiled yam with mustard oil, timur powder, red chili powder, turmeric, and cilantro. Toss gently. Serve warm as a winter seasonal snack, especially during Maghe Sankranti.']
ingredients: ['500g yam (tarul, peeled and cut into chunks)', '4 cups water', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1/2 teaspoon timur powder (Szechuan pepper)', '1/2 teaspoon red chili powder', '1/4 teaspoon turmeric powder', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)']
recipe_name: Tarul Ko Sidra (Boiled Yam with Spices)

cooking_method: ['Chop gundruk finely. In a bowl, mix gundruk, gram flour, onion, green chilies, ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, cumin powder, and salt. Add water gradually to make a thick batter. Heat oil. Drop spoonfuls of batter into hot oil. Fry until golden and crispy (3–4 minutes). Drain. Serve hot with tomato achar during rainy monsoon days.']
ingredients: ['1/2 cup gundruk (fermented leafy greens, rinsed and squeezed dry)', '1 cup gram flour (besan)', '1 small onion (finely chopped)', '2 green chilies (chopped)', '1 teaspoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Water as needed', 'Oil for deep frying']
recipe_name: Gundruk Pakoda (Fermented Greens Fritters - Monsoon Snack)

cooking_method: ['In a large bowl, combine puffed rice, lemon pickle, cucumber, tomato, onion, green chilies, peanuts, and cilantro. Add mustard oil and lemon juice. Toss well until everything is mixed. Serve immediately as a light summer snack.']
ingredients: ['4 cups puffed rice (muri)', '2 tablespoons lemon pickle (nibuwa ko achar, finely chopped)', '1 small cucumber (finely chopped)', '1 small tomato (finely chopped)', '1 small onion (finely chopped)', '2 green chilies (chopped)', '2 tablespoons roasted peanuts', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '1 tablespoon lemon juice']
recipe_name: Nibuwa Ko Achar Bhel (Lemon Pickle Puffed Rice - Summer Cooler)

cooking_method: ['If using fresh corn, remove kernels from cobs. Heat ghee in a large pan. Add corn kernels and roast on medium-high heat for 8–10 minutes until slightly charred and crispy. Add salt, red chili powder, black pepper, and chaat masala. Stir well for 2 minutes. Turn off heat, add lemon juice and cilantro. Serve hot as a harvest season snack.']
ingredients: ['2 cups dried yellow corn kernels (or fresh corn from 4 cobs)', '2 tablespoons ghee or butter', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1/2 teaspoon black pepper powder', '1 teaspoon chaat masala', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)', '1 tablespoon lemon juice']
recipe_name: Bhuteko Makai (Roasted Spiced Corn - Harvest Season)

cooking_method: ['Wash nettle leaves thoroughly using gloves. Chop roughly. Heat oil, add fenugreek seeds and dried chilies until seeds darken. Add ginger paste and turmeric; sauté 30 seconds. Add nettle leaves and stir for 2 minutes (nettle sting disappears upon cooking). Add water and salt. Bring to boil, then simmer for 10 minutes. Garnish with cilantro. Serve warm as a spring detoxifying soup.']
ingredients: ['3 cups fresh stinging nettle leaves (sisnu, use gloves to handle)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 tablespoon ginger paste', '1 teaspoon salt', '4 cups water', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']
recipe_name: Sisnu Ko Jhol (Nettle Soup - Spring Special)

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, add cumin seeds, fenugreek seeds, and dried chilies. Add onion; sauté until light brown. Add turmeric, chili powder, and ivy gourd; stir well. Add salt and cook covered on low heat for 8–10 minutes until ivy gourd is tender, stirring occasionally. Add amchur, mix well. Serve as a dry side dish with rice or roti.']
ingredients: ['300g ivy gourd (phaplinda, washed and sliced lengthwise)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1/2 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '1 small onion (sliced)', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon dry mango powder (amchur)']
recipe_name: Phaplinda Ko Tarkari (Nepali Ivy Gourd Stir-fry - Summer Vegetable)

cooking_method: ['Heat ghee in a pot, add pounded rice and roast for 2 minutes until fragrant. Add water, milk, salt, and sugar/jaggery. Bring to boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15–20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until rice is soft and porridge thickens. Add raisins, cashews, and cardamom powder. Cook 2 more minutes. Serve warm as a winter breakfast.']
ingredients: ['1 cup broken rice (mansuli chiura or pounded rice)', '4 cups milk', '2 cups water', '1/2 cup sugar (or jaggery)', '1/4 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons ghee', '2 tablespoons raisins', '2 tablespoons chopped cashews', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom powder']
recipe_name: Mansuli Ko Dhido (Pounded Rice Porridge - Winter Breakfast)

cooking_method: ['In a bowl, combine green peas, onion, tomato, green chilies, and crushed peanuts. Add mustard oil, salt, chaat masala, black salt, lemon juice, and cilantro. Mix well. Serve immediately as a fresh spring snack.']
ingredients: ['2 cups fresh green peas (parboiled for 2 minutes)', '1 small onion (finely chopped)', '1 tomato (finely chopped)', '2 green chilies (chopped)', '2 tablespoons roasted peanuts (crushed)', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon chaat masala', '1/4 teaspoon black salt', '1 tablespoon lemon juice', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']
recipe_name: Kerau Ko Sadeko (Green Pea Spicy Salad - Spring Snack)

cooking_method: ['Grind hemp seeds coarsely. In a bowl, mix hemp seeds, gram flour, onion, green chilies, ginger paste, turmeric, chili powder, cumin powder, and salt. Add water gradually to make a thick batter. Heat oil. Drop spoonfuls into oil. Fry until golden and crispy (3–4 minutes). Drain. Serve during Holi festival with mint chutney.']
ingredients: ['1/2 cup hemp seeds (bhang ko beu)', '1 cup gram flour (besan)', '1 small onion (finely chopped)', '2 green chilies (chopped)', '1 teaspoon ginger paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Water as needed', 'Oil for deep frying']
recipe_name: Bhang Ko Pakoda (Hemp Seed Fritters - Holi Special)

cooking_method: ['Boil mushrooms in water for 5 minutes. Drain and dry completely in sun for 2–3 hours. Heat mustard oil until smoking, then cool slightly. In a glass jar, layer mushrooms, garlic cloves, fenugreek seeds, turmeric, chili powder, timur, and salt. Pour warm oil and lemon juice over. Close jar, shake well. Keep in sunlight for 3 days, shaking daily. Serve after 3 days as a monsoon specialty.']
ingredients: ['200g wild mushrooms (anadi, cleaned and chopped)', '1/4 cup mustard oil', '1 tablespoon fenugreek seeds', '2 tablespoons turmeric powder', '2 tablespoons red chili powder', '1 tablespoon timur powder', '1 tablespoon salt', '2 tablespoons lemon juice', '1 head garlic (cloves separated and peeled)']
recipe_name: Anadi Ko Achar (Wild Mushroom Pickle - Monsoon Forage)

cooking_method: ['In a pan, cook lapsi with water until soft (10 minutes). Mash into pulp. In another pan, make sugar syrup with 1/4 cup water until one-string consistency. Add lapsi pulp and cardamom powder to syrup. Cook on low heat, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens and leaves the sides of the pan. Add ghee, mix. Spread on greased tray. Let cool and set for 4 hours. Cut into small pieces. Dry in sun for 1 day. Store in airtight container.']
ingredients: ['2 cups lapsi (hog plum, peeled and deseeded, chopped)', '1 cup sugar', '1/4 cup water', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom powder', '1 tablespoon ghee']
recipe_name: Lapsi Ko Mithai (Hog Plum Candy - Winter Sweet)

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, add fenugreek seeds and dried chilies. Add onion; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder; cook 1 minute. Add tomato and kinema; cook for 3 minutes. Add water and salt. Bring to boil, then simmer for 10 minutes. Add timur powder and cilantro. Serve warm with rice.']
ingredients: ['1 cup kinema (fermented soybeans, rinsed)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '1 onion (finely chopped)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 tomato (chopped)', '1 teaspoon salt', '3 cups water', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro', '1/2 teaspoon timur powder']
recipe_name: Kinema Ko Jhol (Fermented Soybean Soup - Limbu Community Special)

cooking_method: ['Squeeze excess water from grated snake gourd. Heat mustard oil until smoking, then cool. In a bowl, combine snake gourd, fenugreek seeds, cumin seeds, asafoetida, turmeric, red chili powder, salt, green chilies, and lemon juice. Pour cooled oil over. Mix well. Let sit for 2 hours before serving. Refrigerate for up to 1 week.']
ingredients: ['2 cups snake gourd (chichindo, peeled, deseeded, and grated)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1/2 teaspoon asafoetida (hing)', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '2 teaspoons red chili powder', '1 tablespoon salt', '2 tablespoons lemon juice', '2 green chilies (slit)']
recipe_name: Chichindo Ko Achar (Snake Gourd Pickle - Summer Condiment)

cooking_method: ['Wash taro stems thoroughly (they may cause itching if not properly cooked). Heat oil, add fenugreek seeds and dried chilies. Add taro stems and turmeric; stir-fry for 5 minutes. Add 1/2 cup water, cover, and cook for 10 minutes until stems are soft. Add chili powder, salt, and amchur. Cook uncovered for 2–3 minutes until dry. Serve as a side dish.']
ingredients: ['2 cups taro stems (pidhalu, peeled and cut into 2-inch pieces)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1 teaspoon dry mango powder (amchur)']
recipe_name: Pidhalu Ko Bhuja (Taro Stem Stir-fry - Monsoon Vegetable)

cooking_method: ['Heat ghee in a pot, add soaked and drained millet. Roast for 2 minutes. Add milk and bring to boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 20–25 minutes, stirring occasionally, until millet is soft and pudding thickens. Add sugar, raisins, almonds, and cardamom powder. Cook for 5 more minutes. Garnish with pistachios. Serve warm or cold.']
ingredients: ['1/2 cup foxtail millet (kaguno, rinsed and soaked for 1 hour)', '4 cups milk', '1/2 cup sugar', '2 tablespoons ghee', '2 tablespoons raisins', '2 tablespoons chopped almonds', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom powder', '1 tablespoon chopped pistachios for garnish']
recipe_name: Kaguno Ko Kheer (Foxtail Millet Pudding - Winter Dessert)

cooking_method: ['Blend bayar fruits, yogurt, water, sugar, cumin powder, and salt until smooth. Add ice cubes and blend again. Pour into glasses. Garnish with mint leaves. Serve cold as a summer afternoon refreshment.']
ingredients: ['1 cup fresh bayar (jujube fruit, deseeded)', '2 cups plain yogurt (dahi)', '1/2 cup cold water', '4 tablespoons sugar (or honey)', '1/2 teaspoon roasted cumin powder', '1/4 teaspoon salt', 'Ice cubes as needed', 'Mint leaves for garnish']
recipe_name: Bayar Ko Lassi (Jujube Yogurt Drink - Summer Fruit Special)

cooking_method: ['Rinse snails thoroughly. Heat oil, add fenugreek and cumin seeds. Add onions; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, coriander; cook 2 minutes. Add tomato puree; cook until oil separates. Add snails and salt; stir for 5 minutes. Add water, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes. Garnish with cilantro. Serve with rice.']
ingredients: ['500g freshwater snails (ghonghi, cleaned and soaked in salt water for 2 hours)', '4 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '2 onions (finely chopped)', '2 tablespoons ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '2 teaspoons red chili powder', '2 teaspoons coriander powder', '3 tomatoes (pureed)', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 cups water', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']

cooking_method: ['Boil fern shoots in water for 5 minutes. Drain. Heat oil, add fenugreek seeds, then onion and green chilies; sauté until onion is soft. Add turmeric, chili powder, and boiled fern shoots; stir-fry for 5–7 minutes. Add salt and timur powder. Cook for 2 more minutes. Serve as a dry vegetable side dish.']
ingredients: ['2 cups wild fern shoots (kachilo, cleaned and chopped into 1-inch pieces)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '1 onion (sliced)', '2 green chilies (slit)', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon timur powder']
recipe_name: Kachilo Ko Tarkari (Wild Edible Fern - Spring Special)

cooking_method: ['In a bowl, mix rice flour, grated coconut, jaggery, and salt. Add water gradually to make a thick batter (like pancake batter). Pour batter onto banana leaf squares. Fold leaves to make parcels. Steam in a steamer for 15–20 minutes until firm. Serve warm as a festival snack in the Terai region.']
ingredients: ['2 cups rice flour (fine)', '1/2 cup grated coconut', '1/2 cup jaggery (grated)', '1/4 teaspoon salt', '1 cup water (or as needed)', 'Banana leaves (cut into squares, for wrapping)']
recipe_name: Bhakka (Steamed Rice Cake - Maithili Festival Special)

cooking_method: ['For base: boil water with salt. Gradually add millet flour while stirring continuously to make a stiff dhido. Remove from heat, knead into flat round base using wet hands. Heat a pan with ghee, cook the millet base on both sides until crisp (5 minutes each side). Spread pizza sauce, add vegetables, top with cheese, oregano, and chili flakes. Cover pan and cook on low heat until cheese melts (3–4 minutes). Serve hot.']
recipe_name: Dhindo Ko Pizza (Finger Millet Pizza - Modern Healthy Snack)

cooking_method: ['In a bowl, mix flour, sugar, cardamom powder, and melted ghee. Add warm water and milk gradually to make a soft dough. Knead for 5 minutes. Cover and rest for 1 hour. Roll dough into small balls or ropes. Heat oil. Deep fry until golden brown (3–4 minutes). Drain. Dust with powdered sugar. Serve during Losar (Tibetan New Year).']
ingredients: ['2 cups all-purpose flour', '1/2 cup sugar', '2 tablespoons ghee (melted)', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom powder', '1/4 cup warm water (or as needed for dough)', '1/4 cup milk', 'Oil for deep frying', 'Powdered sugar for dusting']
recipe_name: Chamre (Sweet Fried Bread - Sherpa Festive Snack)

cooking_method: ['Lightly steam sprouted lentils for 5 minutes. Drain and cool completely. Heat mustard oil until smoking, cool. In a glass jar, layer sprouted lentils and garlic. Mix turmeric, chili powder, fenugreek powder, asafoetida, and salt. Sprinkle spice mix over lentils. Pour cooled oil and lemon juice. Close jar. Keep in sunlight for 2 days, shaking daily. Serve after 2 days as a winter pickle.']
ingredients: ['1 cup whole black lentils (biriya, sprouted for 2 days)', '1/4 cup mustard oil', '2 tablespoons turmeric powder', '2 tablespoons red chili powder', '1 tablespoon fenugreek powder (roasted)', '1 teaspoon asafoetida (hing)', '2 tablespoons salt', '1/4 cup lemon juice', '1 head garlic (peeled)']
recipe_name: Biriya Ko Achar (Black Lentil Sprout Pickle - Winter Ferment)

cooking_method: ['If using dried corn, boil until soft (30 minutes). Drain. Blend half the corn into a coarse paste. Heat ghee, add whole corn kernels and corn paste; sauté for 2 minutes. Add milk and bring to boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 15–20 minutes until thick. Add sugar, raisins, cashews, cardamom, nutmeg, and saffron. Cook 5 more minutes. Serve warm.']
ingredients: ['1 cup fresh corn kernels (or 1/2 cup dried corn, soaked overnight)', '4 cups milk', '1/2 cup sugar', '2 tablespoons ghee', '2 tablespoons raisins', '2 tablespoons chopped cashews', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom powder', '1/4 teaspoon nutmeg powder', '1/2 teaspoon saffron strands (optional)']
recipe_name: Makai Ko Kheer (Corn Pudding - Harvest Festival)

cooking_method: ['Scoop out bael pulp. Boil sugar and water to make one-string syrup. Add bael pulp, cardamom powder, and saffron. Cook on low heat for 20 minutes, stirring frequently, until mixture thickens and becomes translucent. Add lemon juice, cook 2 more minutes. Cool and store in sterilized jar. Serve 1 tablespoon as a summer digestive.']
ingredients: ['2 large bael fruit (wood apple, pulp extracted)', '2 cups sugar', '1 cup water', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom powder', '1 tablespoon lemon juice', '1/2 teaspoon saffron strands (optional)']
recipe_name: Bael Ko Murabba (Wood Apple Preserve - Summer Cooling Sweet)

cooking_method: ['In a bowl, mix millet flour and salt. Add warm water gradually and knead into a soft, pliable dough (millet dough can be sticky). Divide into 8 balls. Place one ball between two greased plastic sheets and press into flat round with hands. Carefully peel top sheet. Transfer to hot tawa (griddle). Cook on both sides until brown spots appear. Brush with ghee. Serve hot with gundruk ko achar.']
ingredients: ['2 cups finger millet flour (kodo ko pitho)', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Warm water as needed (about 1 cup)', 'Ghee for brushing']
recipe_name: Kodo Ko Roti (Finger Millet Flatbread - Hill Station Snack)

cooking_method: ['In a bowl, mix buckwheat flour, salt, and melted ghee. Add warm water gradually and knead into smooth dough. Rest for 10 minutes. Divide into 8 balls. Roll each ball into flat round (buckwheat cracks easily, so handle gently). Cook on hot tawa for 1 minute per side, then cook directly on flame (or press with cloth) until puffed and charred. Brush with ghee. Serve with aloo ko achar.']
ingredients: ['2 cups buckwheat flour (phapar ko pitho)', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons ghee (melted)', 'Warm water as needed (about 1 cup)', 'Extra ghee for cooking']
recipe_name: Phapar Ko Roti (Buckwheat Flatbread - Winter Snack)

cooking_method: ['In a bowl, mix rice flour, mashed banana, sugar, coconut, and cardamom powder. Add water gradually to make a thick, sticky dough. Pinch small portions and roll into smooth balls (no cracks). Heat oil. Deep fry on low-medium heat until golden brown (5–6 minutes). Drain. Serve as a sweet snack during festivals.']
ingredients: ['2 cups rice flour', '1/2 cup mashed ripe banana', '1/2 cup sugar', '1/4 cup grated coconut', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom powder', 'Water as needed', 'Oil for deep frying']
recipe_name: Sel Phulaura (Sweet Rice Flour Dumplings - Festival Sweet)

cooking_method: ['Drain boiled soybeans. In a bowl, combine soybeans, onion, tomato, green chilies, and ground sesame seeds. Add mustard oil, salt, chaat masala, red chili powder, lemon juice, and cilantro. Mix well. Let sit for 5 minutes before serving.']
ingredients: ['1 cup soybeans (bhatmas, soaked overnight and boiled until soft)', '1 small onion (finely chopped)', '1 tomato (finely chopped)', '2 green chilies (chopped)', '2 tablespoons roasted sesame seeds (ground)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon chaat masala', '1/2 teaspoon red chili powder', '2 tablespoons lemon juice', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']
recipe_name: Bhatmas Ko Sadeko (Soybean Spicy Salad - Protein Snack)

cooking_method: ['Drain soaked millet. In a pot, bring water to boil. Add millet and salt. Cook on medium heat for 10–12 minutes until millet is soft and water is absorbed, stirring frequently. Reduce heat, add ghee, and continue stirring until mixture becomes thick like porridge. Serve warm with ghee and gundruk ko jhol.']
ingredients: ['1 cup junelo (local proso millet, rinsed and soaked for 2 hours)', '3 cups water', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons ghee']
recipe_name: Junelo Ko Dhido (Local Millet Porridge - Winter Breakfast)

cooking_method: ['Drain soaked beans and peas. Heat oil, add fenugreek seeds, then onion; sauté until brown. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, coriander; cook 2 minutes. Add tomato puree; cook until oil separates. Add beans, peas, salt, and water. Bring to boil, then simmer for 30–40 minutes until tender. Garnish with cilantro. Serve with rice.']
ingredients: ['1/2 cup dried black-eyed peas (bodi, soaked overnight)', '1/2 cup dried green peas (simi ko bodi, soaked overnight)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '1 onion (finely chopped)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '2 teaspoons red chili powder', '2 teaspoons coriander powder', '2 tomatoes (pureed)', '1 teaspoon salt', '3 cups water', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']
recipe_name: Simi Ko Bodi (Dried Bean and Pea Curry - Hill Winter Dish)

cooking_method: ['In a dry bowl, mix all ground spices: timur, fenugreek, cumin, coriander, chili powder, turmeric, asafoetida, and salt. Add mustard oil gradually while mixing to form a coarse, crumbly paste. Transfer to small jar. Store at room temperature up to 3 months. Serve a pinch with dal bhat for extra heat and flavor.']
ingredients: ['1/4 cup timur (Szechuan pepper, ground)', '2 tablespoons roasted fenugreek seeds (ground)', '2 tablespoons cumin seeds (roasted and ground)', '2 tablespoons coriander seeds (roasted and ground)', '4 tablespoons red chili powder', '1 tablespoon turmeric powder', '1 tablespoon asafoetida (hing)', '2 tablespoons salt', '2 tablespoons mustard oil (for mixing)']
recipe_name: Dhule Achar (Ground Spice Pickle - Instant Condiment)

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, add fenugreek seeds and dried chilies. Add ginger paste, turmeric, and chopped wild greens; sauté for 3 minutes until greens wilt. Add water and salt. Bring to boil, then simmer for 10 minutes. Garnish with cilantro. Serve warm with chiura (beaten rice).']
ingredients: ['3 cups mixed wild greens (hakku - identified by local foragers, washed and chopped)', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '1 teaspoon ginger paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon salt', '4 cups water', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']
recipe_name: Hakku Ko Jhol (Wild Green Soup - Spring Forage)

cooking_method: ['Drain masyaura, squeeze gently. Heat oil, add cumin seeds, then onion; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, coriander; cook 1 minute. Add drained masyaura and salt. Stir-fry for 5–7 minutes until masyaura is crispy on edges. Garnish with cilantro. Serve as a dry side dish.']
ingredients: ['20 masyaura (sun-dried lentil nuggets, soaked in warm water for 30 minutes)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1 onion (sliced)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon coriander powder', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']
recipe_name: Masyaura Ko Piro (Spicy Lentil Nugget Stir-fry - Monsoon Dry Curry)

cooking_method: ['In a bowl, mix chopped titepati, gram flour, onion, green chilies, ginger paste, turmeric, chili powder, ajwain, and salt. Add water gradually to make a thick batter. Heat oil. Drop spoonfuls of batter into hot oil. Fry until golden and crispy (3–4 minutes). Drain. Serve hot with tomato achar. Traditionally eaten during monsoon for its medicinal properties.']
ingredients: ['1 cup fresh titepati (mugwort leaves, washed and chopped)', '1 cup gram flour (besan)', '1 small onion (finely chopped)', '2 green chilies (chopped)', '1 teaspoon ginger paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1/2 teaspoon ajwain (carom seeds)', '1/2 teaspoon salt', 'Water as needed', 'Oil for deep frying']
recipe_name: Titepati Ko Pakoda (Mugwort Fritters - Monsoon Medicinal Snack)

cooking_method: ['Soak cubed yam in salt water for 2 hours (removes itchiness). Drain and rinse. Boil yam in fresh water for 15–20 minutes until tender. Drain. In a bowl, mix boiled yam with mustard oil, timur powder, red chili powder, turmeric, and cilantro. Toss gently. Serve warm as a winter snack.']
ingredients: ['500g simal tarul (elephant foot yam, peeled and cubed)', '4 cups water', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon timur powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro']
recipe_name: Simal Tarul Ko Sidra (Boiled Elephant Foot Yam - Winter Tuber Snack)

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, add fenugreek seeds, then onion; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder; cook 1 minute. Add tomatoes and salt; cook until soft. Add water and bring to boil. Reduce heat to low. Slowly pour in fresh blood while stirring continuously (to prevent lumps). Simmer for 5–7 minutes until blood is cooked and soup thickens. Add timur powder and cilantro. Serve hot with rice (traditional Tharu dish).']
ingredients: ['1 cup fresh buffalo or chicken blood (collected and mixed with 1/2 tsp salt to prevent clotting)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '1 onion (finely chopped)', '2 tablespoons ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '2 teaspoons red chili powder', '2 tomatoes (chopped)', '1 teaspoon salt', '4 cups water', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro', '1 teaspoon timur powder']
recipe_name: Rakta Ko Jhol (Blood Soup - Tharu Community Special)

cooking_method: ['Grind roasted pumpkin seeds, sesame seeds, dried red chilies, timur, and salt into a coarse powder. Add mustard oil and water gradually while grinding to form a thick paste. Transfer to small bowl. Serve as a dry chutney with chiura or roti during winter months.']
ingredients: ['1 cup roasted pumpkin seeds (pepitas)', '2 tablespoons roasted sesame seeds', '2 dried red chilies (roasted)', '1 tablespoon roasted timur (Szechuan pepper)', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '2 tablespoons water (as needed)']
recipe_name: Dhule Lauko (Ground Spice Pumpkin Seeds - Winter Dry Chutney)

cooking_method: ['Wash chopped stems thoroughly. Heat oil, add fenugreek seeds and dried chilies. Add stems and turmeric; stir-fry for 5 minutes. Add 1/2 cup water, cover, and cook for 10 minutes until stems are soft. Add chili powder, salt, and amchur. Cook uncovered until water evaporates. Serve as a dry side dish with rice.']
ingredients: ['2 cups elephant ear stems (palu, peeled and chopped into 1-inch pieces)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1 teaspoon dry mango powder (amchur)']
recipe_name: Palu Ko Bhaji (Elephant Ear Stem Curry - Monsoon Vegetable)

cooking_method: ['Filling:\xa0melt jaggery with 1 tbsp water in a pan. Add coconut, ground sesame, cardamom, and ghee. Cook until thick. Cool.\nDough:\xa0boil water with salt. Gradually add millet flour, stirring to make stiff dough. Cool until handleable.\nAssembly:\xa0take small dough portions, flatten, place filling in center, close into dumplings. Steam in steamer for 10–12 minutes. Serve warm during Sakela (Kirat festival).', 'Let me know if you want the next batch (301–340) or any other range!', 'Nepali Dishes Recipes (301–320)']
recipe_name: Mora (Foxtail Millet Sweet Dumpling - Kirat Community Special)

cooking_method: ['Place the puffed rice in a large mixing bowl and lightly toast it in a dry pan for 2–3 minutes if you want extra crispiness. Add roasted peanuts, chopped onion, diced tomato, and green chilli. Drizzle mustard oil evenly over the mixture and sprinkle salt and chilli flakes. Toss thoroughly so the spices coat every ingredient evenly. Finally, garnish with freshly chopped coriander leaves and serve immediately while crunchy.']
ingredients: ['2 cups puffed rice', '1/2 cup roasted peanuts', '1 small onion finely chopped', '1 tomato diced', '1 green chilli chopped', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '1 teaspoon chilli flakes', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons coriander leaves']

cooking_method: ['Boil the potatoes until soft, peel them, and mash smoothly in a bowl. Add gram flour, cumin powder, minced green chilli, and salt, then mix thoroughly to form a soft dough-like mixture. Shape the mixture into small round patties. Heat oil in a frying pan over medium heat and shallow fry each patty for 3–4 minutes on each side until crisp and golden brown. Remove onto paper towels and serve hot with tomato chutney or spicy achar.']
ingredients: ['2 potatoes boiled and mashed', '1/2 cup gram flour', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1 green chilli minced', '1 teaspoon salt', 'oil for shallow frying']

cooking_method: ['Boil fresh corn kernels until tender and drain well. Heat butter in a skillet over medium heat and sauté the corn for several minutes until lightly roasted and aromatic. Sprinkle black pepper, chilli powder, and salt evenly while stirring continuously. Finish by adding lemon juice for freshness and toss again before serving warm.']
ingredients: ['2 cups boiled corn kernels', '1 tablespoon butter', '1 teaspoon black pepper', '1 teaspoon chilli powder', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 tablespoon lemon juice']

cooking_method: ['In a bowl combine chickpea flour, turmeric powder, salt, and enough water to make a thick smooth batter. Mix in sliced onions and chopped green chillies. Heat oil in a deep pan over medium flame. Drop spoonfuls of batter carefully into the hot oil and fry in batches until crispy and deep golden brown. Drain excess oil on paper towels and serve with tea or chutney.']
ingredients: ['1 cup chickpea flour', '1 onion thinly sliced', '1 green chilli chopped', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon salt', 'water as needed', 'oil for frying']

cooking_method: ['Place beaten rice and roasted soybeans into a large bowl. Add chopped onion and season with timur powder and salt. Drizzle mustard oil evenly and mix thoroughly using your hands or a spoon so every ingredient absorbs the flavor. Let the mixture sit for 5 minutes before serving for better taste and aroma.']
ingredients: ['2 cups beaten rice (chiura)', '1/2 cup roasted soybeans', '1 onion chopped', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '1 teaspoon timur powder', '1 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Combine beaten rice with roasted soybeans and onion. Season with timur powder, salt, and mustard oil. Mix thoroughly and serve as a crunchy snack.']
ingredients: ['2 cups beaten rice (chiura)', '1/2 cup roasted soybeans', '1 onion chopped', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '1 teaspoon timur powder', '1 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Mix chickpeas with potato, onion, and tomato. Add chaat masala, salt, and lemon juice. Toss gently and serve chilled.']
ingredients: ['1 cup boiled black chickpeas', '1 potato diced', '1 onion chopped', '1 tomato chopped', '1 teaspoon chaat masala', '1 tablespoon lemon juice', '1 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Heat butter in a skillet and add roasted peanuts. Stir in chilli powder, black salt, and cumin powder. Roast briefly until aromatic and serve warm.']
ingredients: ['2 cups roasted peanuts', '1 tablespoon butter', '1 teaspoon chilli powder', '1 teaspoon black salt', '1 teaspoon cumin powder']

cooking_method: ['Toast bread cubes in butter until crisp. Sprinkle cheese, oregano, and chilli flakes on top. Heat briefly until cheese melts and serve hot.']
ingredients: ['2 bread slices cubed', '1/2 cup grated cheese', '1 tablespoon butter', '1 teaspoon oregano', '1 teaspoon chilli flakes']

cooking_method: ['Coat banana slices in rice flour mixed with sugar and cinnamon. Deep fry until golden and crispy. Serve warm.']
ingredients: ['2 bananas sliced', '1/2 cup rice flour', '1 tablespoon sugar', '1/4 teaspoon cinnamon powder', 'oil for frying']

cooking_method: ['Heat mustard oil and sauté sesame seeds and green chilli. Add potatoes with turmeric and salt. Toss until lightly crisp and well coated.']
ingredients: ['2 cups boiled potatoes cubed', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '1 teaspoon sesame seeds', '1 green chilli chopped', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix well. Add lemon juice just before serving to maintain crunchiness.']
ingredients: ['1 cup puffed rice', '1/2 cup roasted chickpeas', '1 onion chopped', '1 tomato diced', '1 teaspoon chilli powder', '1 tablespoon lemon juice']

cooking_method: ['Mix semolina with yogurt and seasonings to form a thick batter. Rest for 10 minutes. Fry spoonfuls in hot oil until golden brown.']
ingredients: ['1 cup semolina', '1/2 cup yogurt', '1 onion chopped', '1 green chilli chopped', '1 teaspoon salt', 'oil for frying']

cooking_method: ['Mash sweet potatoes lightly and sauté in butter with spices until slightly caramelized. Serve warm.']
ingredients: ['2 sweet potatoes boiled', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1 teaspoon chilli flakes', '1 tablespoon butter', '1 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['Combine sprouts, cucumber, tomato, and green chilli in a bowl. Season with lemon juice and black salt. Toss and serve fresh.']
ingredients: ['1 cup boiled sprouts', '1 cucumber diced', '1 tomato chopped', '1 tablespoon lemon juice', '1 teaspoon black salt', '1 green chilli chopped']

cooking_method: ['Sauté vegetables in butter until tender. Add boiled pasta, tomato sauce, salt, and pepper. Toss well and cook for 3–4 minutes.']
ingredients: ['2 cups boiled pasta', '1 tablespoon butter', '1/2 cup mixed vegetables', '1 teaspoon black pepper', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 tablespoon tomato sauce']

cooking_method: ['Mix watermelon cubes with chaat masala, black salt, lemon juice, and mint leaves. Chill briefly before serving.']
ingredients: ['2 cups watermelon cubes', '1 tablespoon chaat masala', '1 tablespoon lemon juice', '1 teaspoon black salt', '5 mint leaves chopped']

cooking_method: ['In a bowl combine mashed paneer, boiled potato, garam masala, minced green chilli, and salt. Mix until the ingredients bind together evenly. Shape into small flat cutlets or oval patties. Heat a thin layer of oil in a skillet and shallow fry the cutlets over medium heat until both sides become crispy and golden brown. Serve hot with mint chutney or ketchup.']
ingredients: ['1 cup mashed paneer', '1 boiled potato mashed', '1 teaspoon garam masala', '1 green chilli minced', '1 teaspoon salt', 'oil for shallow frying']

cooking_method: ['Prepare freshly popped popcorn and transfer it into a large bowl. Drizzle melted butter slowly while tossing continuously so the popcorn gets coated evenly. Sprinkle chilli powder, garlic powder, and salt over the popcorn and mix again thoroughly. Serve immediately while warm and crunchy.']
ingredients: ['2 cups popcorn', '2 tablespoons melted butter', '1 teaspoon chilli powder', '1 teaspoon garlic powder', '1 teaspoon salt']

cooking_method: ['In a mixing bowl whisk flour, sugar, cardamom powder, and milk together until a smooth thick batter forms. Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat. Drop small spoonfuls of batter carefully into the hot oil and fry until puffed and golden brown on all sides. Remove and drain excess oil. Garnish with chopped nuts and serve warm as a sweet snack or dessert.']
ingredients: ['1 cup flour', '1/2 cup sugar', '1/2 teaspoon cardamom powder', '1/2 cup milk', 'oil for frying', '2 tablespoons chopped nuts']

cooking_method: ['In a large mixing bowl combine puffed rice, roasted peanuts and sev. Heat mustard oil in a small pan until smoking hot then pour it over the mixture to give a nice aroma. Add chopped onion, tomato, green chilies, chaat masala, red chili powder, salt and lemon juice. Mix everything thoroughly but gently so the puffed rice does not break too much. Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve immediately as a crunchy evening snack.']
