Add onion, carrot, cabbage; stir-fry 2 minutes. Add broth, soy sauce, tomato paste, chili powder, turmeric, salt, and black pepper. Bring to boil, then simmer 15 minutes until meat is tender. Add cooked noodles, cilantro, green onions. Heat 2 minutes. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['200g noodles (any type)', '300g buffalo meat (thinly sliced)', '2 tablespoons vegetable oil', '1 tablespoon ginger (minced)', '3 cloves garlic (minced)', '1 small onion (sliced)', '1 carrot (julienned)', '1/2 cup cabbage (shredded)', '6 cups buffalo bone broth (or beef/water)', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', '1 tablespoon tomato paste', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)', '2 green onions (chopped)', '1 teaspoon black pepper powder']

cooking_method: ['Dough:\xa0Mix flour and salt, add warm water and oil. Knead for 8 minutes until smooth. Cover and rest 30 minutes.\nSoup:\xa0Heat oil in pot, add ginger, garlic, onion; sauté until golden. Add meat if using; brown for 5 minutes. Add carrot, radish, potato; stir 2 minutes. Add broth, tomatoes, turmeric, chili powder, salt. Bring to boil, then simmer 15 minutes until vegetables are tender.\nNoodles:\xa0Roll rested dough into thin sheet. Cut into strips (1 inch wide). Stretch each strip by pulling and slapping on counter to create thin, uneven noodles. Drop stretched noodles directly into simmering soup. Cook for 5–7 minutes until noodles float and are tender. Add cilantro and green onions. Serve hot.']
recipe_name: Thenthuk (Hand-pulled Noodle Soup - Tibetan/Nepali Mountain Soup)

cooking_method: ['Prepare dough as in #483, rest 30 minutes. Heat oil in pot, add ginger, garlic, onion; sauté 1 minute. Add beef; brown for 5–7 minutes. Add carrot, celery; stir 2 minutes. Add broth, tomatoes, turmeric, chili powder, cumin, salt. Bring to boil, then simmer 20 minutes until beef is tender. Stretch dough into thin noodles as in #483. Drop into simmering soup, cook 5–7 minutes. Add cilantro and green onions. Serve hot.']

['Cook noodles, drain, set aside. Heat oil in pot, add ginger and garlic; sauté 1 minute. Add ground meat; cook until browned (5 minutes). Add onion; sauté 2 minutes. Add broth, soy sauce, chili sauce, turmeric, salt, pepper. Bring to boil, then simmer 10 minutes. If using eggs, slowly drizzle beaten eggs into soup while stirring. Add cooked noodles, cilantro, green onions. Heat 2 minutes. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['250g fresh or dried thin noodles (egg noodles preferred)', '2 tablespoons vegetable oil', '1 tablespoon ginger (minced)', '2 cloves garlic (minced)', '200g ground buffalo or chicken', '1 small onion (finely chopped)', '6 cups broth (meat or vegetable)', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', '1 tablespoon chili sauce', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon salt', '1/4 teaspoon black pepper', '2 eggs (beaten, optional)', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro', '2 green onions (chopped)']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil in a large pot. Add ginger, garlic, onion; sauté until golden. Add meat; brown on all sides (8–10 minutes). Add carrots, potatoes, turnip; stir for 3 minutes. Add water/broth, tomatoes, turmeric, chili powder, cumin, coriander, salt, black pepper. Bring to boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 25–30 minutes until meat and vegetables are tender. Garnish with cilantro and green onions. Serve hot with Tibetan bread or thenthuk noodles.']
ingredients: ['400g yak meat (or beef/mutton, cubed)', '2 tablespoons vegetable oil', '1 tablespoon ginger (minced)', '3 cloves garlic (minced)', '1 large onion (chopped)', '2 carrots (cubed)', '2 potatoes (cubed)', '1 turnip (cubed, optional)', '6 cups water or broth', '2 tomatoes (chopped)', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1 teaspoon coriander powder', '1.5 teaspoons salt', '1/2 teaspoon black pepper', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro', '2 green onions (chopped)', 'Bread or thenthuk noodles for serving']
recipe_name: Shyakpa (Tibetan Meat Stew - Mountain Comfort Food)

cooking_method: ['In a pot, combine lentils, water, turmeric, and salt. Bring to boil, skim foam. Simmer for 15 minutes until lentils are soft and broken down. In a small pan, heat ghee, add cumin seeds and dried red chilies until they splutter. Add ginger; fry 30 seconds. Pour this tempering into the dal soup. Stir well. Add cilantro and lemon juice. Serve hot as a soup or with rice.']
ingredients: ['1 cup red lentils (masoor dal, rinsed)', '5 cups water', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 tablespoon ghee', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '1 tablespoon ginger (julienned), ', ', ']
recipe_name: Dal Soup (Plain Lentil Soup - Simple Broth)

cooking_method: ['Heat mustard oil in a pot until smoking. Add fenugreek seeds until dark. Add onion and green chilies; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder; cook 1 minute. Add chopped tomatoes; cook until soft (5 minutes). Add water and salt. Bring to boil, then simmer for 10 minutes. Blend with immersion blender (or leave chunky). Garnish with cilantro and a drizzle of ghee. Serve hot with crusty bread or chiura.']
ingredients: ['6 large ripe tomatoes (chopped)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '1 small onion (finely chopped)', '2 green chilies (slit)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '4 cups water', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)', '1 tablespoon ghee (for garnish)']
recipe_name: Tomato Soup Nepali Style (Golbheda Ko Jhol)

cooking_method: ['In a large pot, combine chicken, water, ginger, garlic, onion, carrot, celery, salt, and peppercorns. Bring to boil, skim foam. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes. Strain through a sieve to get clear broth. Return broth to pot, add chopped cilantro and lemon juice. If using boneless chicken, shred and add back. Serve hot as a clear nourishing soup.']
ingredients: ['500g chicken bones with some meat (or 200g boneless chicken)', '6 cups water', '1 tablespoon ginger (sliced)', '4 cloves garlic (crushed)', '1 small onion (quartered)', '1 carrot (roughly chopped)', '1 celery stalk (chopped, optional)', '1 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon black pepper corns', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)', '1 tablespoon lemon juice']

cooking_method: ['In a large pot, combine bones, water, ginger, garlic, onion, bay leaves, cardamom, cinnamon, peppercorns, and salt. Bring to boil, skim foam. Reduce heat, simmer for 2–4 hours (longer is better). Strain broth. Heat ghee in a small pan, add a pinch of pepper, pour into broth. Garnish with cilantro. Serve hot as a nourishing soup for colds or postpartum recovery.']
ingredients: ['500g mutton or goat bones (with some meat)', '7 cups water', '1 tablespoon ginger (crushed)', '4 cloves garlic (crushed)', '1 onion (quartered)', '2 bay leaves', '4 green cardamom pods', '1 cinnamon stick', '1 teaspoon black peppercorns', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 tablespoon ghee', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)']
prep_time: 25 minutes (plus optional 2–4 hours for richer broth)
recipe_name: Mutton Bone Broth (Khasi Ko Haddi Ko Jhol)

cooking_method: ['Place bones in a large pot, cover with water. Bring to boil, drain water (this removes scum). Refill with 8 cups fresh water. Add ginger, garlic, onion, bay leaves, turmeric, peppercorns, and salt. Bring to boil, skim foam. Reduce heat, simmer for 3–4 hours. Strain broth. Heat ghee in small pan, add timur powder, fry 10 seconds, pour into broth. Garnish with cilantro. Serve hot. This rich bone broth is traditionally consumed in winter.']
ingredients: ['600g buffalo bones (marrow bones preferred)', '8 cups water', '1 tablespoon ginger (crushed)', '5 cloves garlic (crushed)', '1 onion (quartered)', '2 bay leaves', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon black peppercorns', '1.5 teaspoons salt', '1 tablespoon timur (Szechuan pepper, coarsely ground)', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)', '1 tablespoon ghee']
recipe_name: Buffalo Bone Soup (Rango Ko Haddi Ko Jhol)

cooking_method: ['Blend 1 cup of corn kernels with 1 cup water to make a paste. In a pot, heat butter, add ginger and green chilies; sauté 1 minute. Add remaining whole corn kernels and corn paste; stir 2 minutes. Add remaining water, turmeric, white pepper, and salt. Bring to boil, then simmer 10 minutes. Slowly add cornflour slurry while stirring until soup thickens. If using egg, slowly drizzle beaten egg while stirring. Garnish with cilantro and spring onions. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['2 cups fresh or frozen corn kernels', '4 cups water or vegetable broth', '1 tablespoon butter or ghee', '1 tablespoon ginger (minced)', '2 green chilies (slit)', '1/4 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1/2 teaspoon white pepper powder', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons cornflour (mixed with 1/4 cup cold water)', '1 egg (beaten, optional)', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)', '2 tablespoons spring onions (chopped)']
recipe_name: Corn Soup (Makai Ko Jhol - Nepali Style Sweet Corn Soup)

cooking_method: ['Heat butter in a pot, add onion, garlic, ginger; sauté until soft (3 minutes). Add mushrooms; cook until they release water and start to brown (8 minutes). Sprinkle flour, stir for 2 minutes. Gradually add broth while stirring constantly. Bring to boil, then simmer for 10 minutes. Blend soup partially or fully with immersion blender. Add milk, salt, pepper, nutmeg. Heat through (do not boil after adding milk). Garnish with fresh thyme or cilantro. Serve hot with bread.']
ingredients: ['300g button mushrooms (sliced)', '2 tablespoons butter or ghee', '1 onion (finely chopped)', '2 cloves garlic (minced)', '1 tablespoon ginger (minced)', '4 cups vegetable or chicken broth', '2 tablespoons all-purpose flour', '1/2 cup milk (or cream)', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/4 teaspoon black pepper powder', '1/4 teaspoon nutmeg powder', '2 tablespoons fresh thyme (or cilantro for garnish)']
recipe_name: Mushroom Soup (Chyau Ko Jhol - Nepali Style)

cooking_method: ['In a pot, heat butter, add onion and garlic; sauté until soft (3 minutes). Add potato; cook 2 minutes. Add spinach and broth. Bring to boil, then simmer for 10 minutes until potato is soft. Blend until smooth. Return to pot, add milk, salt, pepper, nutmeg. Heat through (do not boil). Garnish with fresh cream. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['4 cups fresh spinach (palak, washed and chopped)', '2 tablespoons butter or ghee', '1 small onion (chopped)', '2 cloves garlic (minced)', '1 small potato (peeled and cubed)', '3 cups vegetable broth or water', '1/2 cup milk or cream', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/4 teaspoon black pepper powder', '1/4 teaspoon nutmeg powder', '2 tablespoons fresh cream (for garnish)']

cooking_method: ['Heat ghee in a pot, add onion and garlic; sauté until soft (3 minutes). Add cauliflower florets and potato; stir for 3 minutes. Add broth, bring to boil, then simmer for 15 minutes until vegetables are tender. Blend until smooth. Return to pot, add milk, salt, white pepper, cumin powder. Heat through. Garnish with cilantro. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['1 medium cauliflower (cut into florets)', '2 tablespoons ghee', '1 onion (chopped)', '2 cloves garlic (minced)', '1 small potato (cubed)', '4 cups vegetable broth', '1/2 cup milk', '1/2 teaspoon salt', '1/4 teaspoon white pepper powder', '1/4 teaspoon roasted cumin powder', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)']

cooking_method: ['Heat ghee in a pot, add onion and ginger-garlic paste; sauté 2 minutes. Add all vegetables; stir-fry for 3 minutes. Add water, tomato, turmeric, chili powder, salt. Bring to boil, then simmer for 10 minutes until vegetables are tender. Add cornflour slurry and stir until soup thickens slightly (2 minutes). Garnish with cilantro. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['1/2 cup carrot (diced)', '1/2 cup cauliflower (florets)', '1/2 cup cabbage (shredded)', '1/2 cup green peas (fresh or frozen)', '1/2 cup beans (chopped)', '2 tablespoons ghee', '1 onion (chopped)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '4 cups water or vegetable broth', '1 tomato (chopped)', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons cornflour (mixed with 1/4 cup water)', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)']
recipe_name: Mixed Veg Soup (Mix Tarkari Ko Jhol)

cooking_method: ['Marinate meat with ginger-garlic paste, 1 teaspoon turmeric, 1 teaspoon chili powder, and 1 teaspoon salt. Set aside for 2 hours. Heat mustard oil in a pot, add marinated meat; fry until browned (8–10 minutes). Add remaining turmeric, chili powder, coriander, cumin, bay leaves, cloves, cardamom, cinnamon; stir for 2 minutes. Add water and remaining salt. Bring to boil, then simmer for 30–40 minutes until meat is tender and soup reduces slightly. In a small pan, heat ghee, add slit green chilies, pour into soup. Garnish with cilantro. Serve hot with rice or roti.']
ingredients: ['400g buffalo or mutton meat (cut into small pieces)', '3 tablespoons mustard oil', '2 tablespoons ginger-garlic paste', '2 teaspoons turmeric powder', '2 teaspoons red chili powder', '2 teaspoons coriander powder', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1 tablespoon salt', '6 cups water', '2 bay leaves', '4 cloves', '2 green cardamom pods', '1 cinnamon stick', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)', '2 green chilies (slit)', '1 tablespoon ghee']
recipe_name: Taas Soup (Marinated Fried Meat Soup - Nepali Spicy Broth)

cooking_method: ['Heat mustard oil in a pot until smoking. Add fenugreek seeds until dark. Add onion; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder; cook 1 minute. Add tomato puree; cook until oil separates (5 minutes). Add water, timur powder, salt, and sugar. Bring to boil, then simmer for 8 minutes. Garnish with cilantro. Pour jhol momo broth over steamed momos (vegetable or meat) and serve as soup-style momos.']
ingredients: ['4 large tomatoes (pureed)', '3 cups water', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '1 small onion (finely chopped)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 tablespoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon timur powder (Szechuan pepper)', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)', '1 teaspoon sugar (optional)']
recipe_name: Jhol Momo Broth (Momo Soup Base - Tangy Tomato Broth)

cooking_method: ['Chop gundruk roughly. Heat mustard oil in a pot until smoking. Add fenugreek seeds and dried red chilies until seeds darken. Add onion; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder; cook 1 minute. Add chopped gundruk; stir-fry for 2–3 minutes. Add water and salt. Bring to boil, then simmer for 12–15 minutes. Garnish with cilantro. Serve hot with rice or dhido. This soup is traditionally consumed in winter.']
ingredients: ['1 cup gundruk (fermented leafy greens, rinsed and squeezed)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '1 small onion (sliced)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '6 cups water', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)']
recipe_name: Gundruk Ko Jhol (Fermented Greens Soup - Traditional Sour Soup)

cooking_method: ['Chop sinki into small pieces. Heat mustard oil in a pot until smoking. Add fenugreek seeds and dried chilies. Add onion; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder; cook 1 minute. Add chopped sinki; stir-fry for 3 minutes. Add water and salt. Bring to boil, then simmer for 12–15 minutes. Garnish with cilantro. Serve hot with rice or dhido. Sinki is similar to gundruk but made from radish; it has a distinct sour and earthy flavor.']
ingredients: ['1 cup sinki (fermented radish roots, rinsed and squeezed, chopped)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '1 onion (sliced)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '6 cups water', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)']

cooking_method: ['Refer to #401 Kwati for detailed method. For soup version, use more water (7 cups instead of 6) and serve as broth-heavy soup. Kwati is traditionally a soup consumed during Janai Purnima festival.']
ingredients: ['1/4 cup each of 9 types of sprouted legumes: black gram, green gram, chickpeas, field beans, soybean, black-eyed peas, cowpeas, lentils, peas (total 2.25 cups)', '7 cups water', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '2 teaspoons red chili powder', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1 teaspoon coriander powder', '2 tomatoes (chopped)', '1 tablespoon salt', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro', '1 teaspoon ghee', '1 teaspoon carom seeds (ajwain) for tempering']
recipe_name: Kwati Soup (Mixed Sprouted Bean Soup - Already detailed as #401, here as soup version)

cooking_method: ['Dhido:\xa0In a pot, bring water and salt to boil. Reduce heat to low. Gradually sprinkle flour into water while stirring continuously with a wooden spoon (dhido chau). Stir vigorously in one direction to prevent lumps. Keep adding flour until mixture becomes thick and pulls away from sides of pot (5–7 minutes). Cover and cook on lowest heat for 3 minutes.\nServe:\xa0Place a portion of dhido in a bowl. Pour hot gundruk/sinki/dal soup over and around dhido. Eat by pinching dhido with fingers and dipping into soup. This is a traditional hill staple.']
recipe_name: Dhido with Soup (Dhido Ra Jhol - Accompaniment)
serves: Place a portion of dhido in a bowl. Pour hot gundruk/sinki/dal soup over and around dhido. Eat by pinching dhido with fingers and dipping into soup. This is a traditional hill staple.

cooking_method: ['Heat oil in a pot, add ginger and garlic; sauté 30 seconds. Add all vegetables; stir-fry for 2 minutes. Add broth, soy sauce, vinegar, chili sauce, black pepper, white pepper, and salt. Bring to boil, then simmer 5 minutes. Add cornflour slurry and stir until soup thickens. If using egg, slowly drizzle beaten egg while stirring. Garnish with spring onions. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['1/2 cup carrot (julienned)', '1/2 cup cabbage (shredded)', '1/4 cup bamboo shoot (sliced, optional)', '1/4 cup mushrooms (sliced)', '4 cups vegetable or chicken broth', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', '3 tablespoons vinegar (white or rice)', '1 tablespoon red chili sauce', '1 teaspoon black pepper powder', '1/2 teaspoon white pepper powder', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons cornflour (mixed with 1/4 cup water)', '1 egg (beaten, optional)', '2 tablespoons spring onions (chopped)', '1 tablespoon oil', '1 teaspoon ginger (minced)', '2 cloves garlic (minced)']

cooking_method: ['Filling:\xa0Mix ground meat, ginger, garlic, soy sauce, sesame oil, white pepper, salt, and green onion.\nWontons:\xa0Place 1 teaspoon filling in center of each wrapper. Wet edges, fold into triangle or desired shape, seal.\nSoup:\xa0Bring broth to boil, add soy sauce, sesame oil, white pepper, salt. Reduce heat to simmer. Drop wontons into simmering broth. Cook for 4–5 minutes until wontons float and are cooked through. Garnish with green onions and cilantro. Serve hot.']

['Cook noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside. In a pot, bring broth to boil. Add soy sauce, ginger, white pepper, salt, and sesame oil. Reduce heat to low. Slowly drizzle beaten eggs into the broth while stirring gently to create egg ribbons. Add cooked noodles. Heat through for 2 minutes. Garnish with spring onions and cilantro. Serve hot as a light meal.']
ingredients: ['150g thin noodles (vermicelli or egg noodles)', '5 cups chicken or vegetable broth', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', '1 teaspoon ginger (minced)', '2 eggs (beaten)', '1/2 teaspoon white pepper powder', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 teaspoon sesame oil', '2 tablespoons spring onions (chopped)', '1 tablespoon fresh cilantro (chopped)']
recipe_name: Noodle Egg Drop Soup (Anda Chowmein Jhol)

cooking_method: ['In a pot, cook lentils with water and turmeric for 12 minutes until soft. In a separate pan, heat ghee, add onion, garlic, ginger; sauté until golden. Add spinach; cook until wilted (2 minutes). Add cooked lentils with their water, cumin powder, salt, and pepper. Simmer for 5 minutes. Blend partially or fully. Add milk, lemon juice, and cilantro. Heat through. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['1/2 cup red lentils (masoor dal, rinsed)', '4 cups water', '2 tablespoons ghee', '1 small onion (chopped)', '2 cloves garlic (minced)', '1 teaspoon ginger (minced)', '2 cups fresh spinach (chopped)', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon black pepper powder', '1/2 cup milk or cream', '1 tablespoon lemon juice', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)']
recipe_name: Lentil and Spinach Soup (Dal Palak Soup)

cooking_method: ['In a pot, bring water to boil. Add carrot, cabbage, green beans, tomato, ginger, garlic, salt, and pepper. Simmer for 8 minutes until vegetables are tender but still crisp. In a small pan, heat ghee, add timur powder, fry 5 seconds, pour into broth. Garnish with cilantro. Serve hot as a light clear soup. This is traditionally consumed when ill for easy digestion.']
ingredients: ['5 cups water', '1 small carrot (thinly sliced)', '1/4 cup cabbage (shredded)', '2 tablespoons green beans (chopped)', '1 small tomato (chopped)', '1 teaspoon ginger (julienned)', '2 cloves garlic (thinly sliced)', '1 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon black pepper powder', '1 teaspoon ghee (for tempering)', '1/4 teaspoon timur powder (Szechuan pepper)', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)']
recipe_name: Vegetable Clear Broth (Pahadi Saag Jhol - Simple Himalayan Broth)

cooking_method: ['In a pot, combine chicken, water, ginger (2 tablespoons), garlic, onion, salt, and peppercorns. Bring to boil, skim foam. Reduce heat, simmer for 30 minutes. Strain broth. Add remaining 1 tablespoon julienned ginger to broth. Simmer for 5 minutes. Add cilantro, lemon juice, and ghee. Serve hot. This broth is used for colds and respiratory health.']
ingredients: ['300g chicken bones with some meat (or 200g boneless chicken)', '6 cups water', '3 tablespoons fresh ginger (julienned)', '4 cloves garlic (crushed)', '1 small onion (quartered)', '1 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon black peppercorns', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)', '1 tablespoon lemon juice', '1 teaspoon ghee']
recipe_name: Chicken and Ginger Broth (Kukhura Ra Aduwa Ko Jhol)

cooking_method: ['Squeeze water from soaked soya chunks. Heat oil in a pot, add onion; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, coriander; cook 1 minute. Add tomato puree; cook until oil separates. Add soya chunks; stir-fry for 3 minutes. Add broth and salt. Bring to boil, then simmer for 10 minutes. Add cilantro and lemon juice. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['1 cup soya chunks (soaked in warm water for 30 minutes, drained)', '2 tablespoons vegetable oil', '1 onion (finely chopped)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon coriander powder', '2 tomatoes (pureed)', '5 cups vegetable broth', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)', '1 tablespoon lemon juice']
recipe_name: Soya Chunk Soup (Bhatmas Ko Jhol - Vegetarian Protein Soup)

cooking_method: ['Heat oil in a pot, add ginger, garlic, onion; sauté until soft. Add mushrooms; cook until they release water (5 minutes). Add tofu cubes; stir gently for 2 minutes. Add broth, soy sauce, chili sauce, white pepper, salt. Bring to boil, then simmer for 8 minutes. Garnish with spring onions and cilantro. Serve hot.']
ingredients: ['200g firm tofu (cubed)', '200g button mushrooms (sliced)', '2 tablespoons vegetable oil', '1 tablespoon ginger (minced)', '2 cloves garlic (minced)', '1 small onion (chopped)', '5 cups vegetable broth', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', '1 teaspoon red chili sauce', '1/2 teaspoon white pepper powder', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons spring onions (chopped)', '1 tablespoon fresh cilantro (chopped)']
recipe_name: Tofu and Mushroom Soup (Tofu Chyau Ko Jhol)

cooking_method: ['Heat mustard oil in a pot until smoking. Add fenugreek seeds and dried red chilies. Add onion; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder; cook 1 minute. Add potato, peas, and greens; stir for 2 minutes. Add water and salt. Bring to boil, then simmer for 15 minutes until potato is tender. Garnish with cilantro. Serve hot with chiura or roti.']
ingredients: ['2 cups mixed seasonal greens (spinach, mustard greens, fenugreek - chopped)', '1 potato (cubed)', '1/2 cup fresh or dried peas', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '1 onion (chopped)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '5 cups water', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)']
recipe_name: Pahadi Soup (Hill-style Vegetable Soup - Himalayan Greens)

cooking_method: ['Heat mustard oil in a pot until smoking. Add fenugreek seeds and dried red chilies. Add onion; sauté until golden. Add ginger paste, turmeric, chili powder; cook 1 minute. Add chopped mustard greens; stir-fry for 3 minutes until wilted. Add water and salt. Bring to boil, then simmer for 10 minutes. Garnish with cilantro. Serve hot with rice or dhido.']
ingredients: ['3 cups fresh mustard greens (rayo ko sag, washed and chopped)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '1 small onion (sliced)', '1 tablespoon ginger paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '5 cups water', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)']
recipe_name: Rayo Sag Soup (Mustard Greens Soup - Pahadi Specialty)

cooking_method: ['Boil fern shoots in water for 5 minutes, drain. Heat mustard oil in a pot until smoking. Add fenugreek seeds and dried red chilies. Add onion; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder; cook 1 minute. Add blanched fern shoots; stir-fry for 3 minutes. Add water, timur powder, and salt. Bring to boil, then simmer for 10 minutes. Garnish with cilantro. Serve hot with rice. Niuro is a seasonal delicacy in spring.']
ingredients: ['2 cups fresh fern shoots (niuro, cleaned and chopped into 1-inch pieces)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '1 onion (chopped)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon timur powder (Szechuan pepper)', '5 cups water', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)']
recipe_name: Niuro Ko Soup (Fern Shoot Soup - Himalayan Spring Special)

cooking_method: ['Heat mustard oil in a pot until smoking. Add fenugreek seeds and dried red chilies. Add onion; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder; cook 1 minute. Add bamboo shoots and potato (if using); stir-fry for 3 minutes. Add water and salt. Bring to boil, then simmer for 15 minutes. Garnish with cilantro. Serve hot with rice. This soup is sour from fermented bamboo.']
ingredients: ['1 cup fermented bamboo shoots (tama, rinsed and sliced)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '1 onion (sliced)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '6 cups water', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)', '1 potato (cubed, optional)']
recipe_name: Bamboo Shoot Soup (Tama Ko Jhol - Sour Bamboo Shoot Broth)

cooking_method: ['Wear gloves when handling raw taro leaves (they can cause itching). Chop leaves roughly. Heat mustard oil in a pot until smoking. Add fenugreek seeds and dried red chilies. Add onion; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder; cook 1 minute. Add taro leaves and baking soda; stir-fry for 3–4 minutes until leaves wilt and change color. Add water and salt. Bring to boil, then simmer for 12–15 minutes. Garnish with cilantro. Serve hot with rice. Cooking neutralizes the itching effect.']
ingredients: ['6 large taro leaves (karkalo, stems removed, leaves chopped - wear gloves if sensitive)', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 teaspoon fenugreek seeds', '2 dried red chilies', '1 onion (chopped)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '5 cups water', '1 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon baking soda (to reduce itching)', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)']

cooking_method: ['Heat ghee in a pot, add onion and garlic; sauté until soft. Add potatoes; stir for 2 minutes. Add chopped dill; cook for 2 minutes until fragrant. Add water, turmeric, salt, and pepper. Bring to boil, then simmer for 12 minutes until potatoes are tender. Add milk if using, heat through. Garnish with fresh dill leaves. Serve hot with crusty bread.']
ingredients: ['1 cup fresh dill (sapla, finely chopped, including stems)', '2 medium potatoes (cubed)', '2 tablespoons ghee', '1 small onion (chopped)', '2 cloves garlic (minced)', '4 cups water or vegetable broth', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon black pepper powder', '1/2 cup milk (optional)', '2 tablespoons fresh dill leaves (for garnish)']
recipe_name: Dill and Potato Soup (Sapla Ko Jhol - Fresh Dill Soup)

cooking_method: ['Place marrow bones in a pot, cover with water. Bring to boil, drain and discard water (to clean bones). Refill with 6 cups fresh water. Add ginger, garlic, onion, bay leaves, peppercorns, cinnamon, salt, chili powder, turmeric. Bring to boil, skim foam. Reduce heat and simmer for 2–3 hours (longer is better). Remove bones, scoop out marrow and add back to soup. Strain broth. Heat ghee in small pan, add timur powder, pour into broth. Add lemon juice and cilantro. Serve hot. This is a rich, nourishing winter soup.']
ingredients: ['500g marrow bones (beef, buffalo, or mutton)', '6 cups water', '1 tablespoon ginger (crushed)', '4 cloves garlic (crushed)', '1 onion (quartered)', '2 bay leaves', '1 teaspoon black peppercorns', '1 cinnamon stick', '1 teaspoon salt', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1/2 teaspoon turmeric powder', '1 tablespoon ghee', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)', '1 teaspoon timur powder (Szechuan pepper)', '1 tablespoon lemon juice']
recipe_name: Spiced Bone Marrow Soup (Haddi Ko Geda Ko Jhol)

cooking_method: ['In a pot, bring broth to boil with ginger, green chilies, salt, black pepper, soy sauce, and sesame oil. Reduce heat to gentle simmer. Crack eggs one by one into a small bowl, then gently slide each egg into the simmering broth. Poach eggs for 4–5 minutes until whites are set but yolks are runny (or longer for hard yolks). Gently remove eggs with a slotted spoon and place in serving bowls. Pour broth over eggs. Garnish with spring onions and cilantro. Serve hot with bread or chiura.']
ingredients: ['4 large eggs', '5 cups chicken or vegetable broth', '1 tablespoon ginger (julienned)', '2 green chilies (slit)', '1 teaspoon salt', '1/2 teaspoon black pepper powder', '1 tablespoon soy sauce', '1 teaspoon sesame oil', '2 tablespoons spring onions (chopped)', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)']
recipe_name: Whole Egg Soup (Anda Ko Jhol - Poached Egg Broth)

cooking_method: ['In a pot, combine water, lemongrass, ginger, garlic, thyme, mint, peppercorns, and salt. Bring to boil, then simmer for 10 minutes. Strain broth. Add lemon juice and ghee. Heat through. Garnish with cilantro and lemon slices. Serve hot as a cleansing, aromatic broth.']
ingredients: ['5 cups water', '2 stalks lemongrass (bruised)', '1 tablespoon ginger (sliced)', '3 cloves garlic (crushed)', '2 sprigs fresh thyme (or 1 teaspoon dried)', '2 sprigs fresh mint', '1 teaspoon black peppercorns', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice', '1 tablespoon ghee', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)', '1 lemon (sliced, for garnish)']
recipe_name: Lemon and Herb Clear Broth (Nibuwa Herbs Ko Jhol)

cooking_method: ['In a pot, cook lentils with water and turmeric for 12 minutes until soft. In a separate pan, heat ghee, add cumin seeds until they splutter. Add onion; sauté until golden. Add ginger-garlic paste, chili powder, coriander powder; cook 1 minute. Add tomatoes; cook until soft. Pour this mixture into cooked lentils. Add salt and garam masala. Simmer for 5 minutes. Add cilantro and lemon juice. Serve hot as a spiced lentil soup with bread or rice.']
ingredients: ['1 cup red lentils (masoor dal, rinsed)', '5 cups water', '1 teaspoon turmeric powder', '2 tablespoons ghee', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '1 onion (finely chopped)', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '2 tomatoes (chopped)', '1 teaspoon red chili powder', '1 teaspoon coriander powder', '1/2 teaspoon garam masala', '1 teaspoon salt', '2 tablespoons fresh cilantro (chopped)', '1 tablespoon lemon juice']
recipe_name: Spiced Red Lentil Soup (Masala Masoor Dal Soup)
